    "output": "Chunk ID: 7c74a2\nWall time: 0.0504 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 3259\nOutput:\n# Modular Monolith — Canonical Folder Structure Template\n\n> **Purpose:** This document is the canonical reference for building any new feature or module\n> in this codebase. Every agent, developer, or tool that adds code MUST follow this structure\n> exactly. It enforces high cohesion, low coupling, and zero cyclic dependencies by design.\n\n---\n\n## Core Architectural Rules (Read Before Writing Any Code)\n\n### Rule 1 — Dependency Direction is One-Way and Downward Only\n```\nshared/          ← no dependencies on any module (foundational)\n    ↓\n[module-A]       ← may depend on shared only\n    ↓\n[module-B]       ← may depend on shared + module-A\n    ↓\n[module-C]       ← may depend on shared + module-A + module-B\n    ↓\nadmin/           ← thin orchestration layer, depends on all modules but owns no domain\n    ↓\napp/             ← entry point only, no business logic\n```\n**A module NEVER imports from a module below it or at the same level.**\n**If two modules need to talk, they do so through Spring Events — never direct service calls.**\n\n### Rule 2 — Three Ways Modules Communicate (Pick the Right One)\n| Communication Type | When to Use | Mechanism |\n|---|---|---|\n| Query (sync, read-only) | Module B needs data that Module A owns | Module B calls Module A's **public API endpoint** (HTTP), never imports Module A's service class directly |\n| Command (async, fire-and-forget) | Module A completed something and others should react | Module A publishes a **Spring ApplicationEvent**; interested modules register a listener |\n| Shared contract | Enums, base classes, standard DTOs used by 2+ modules | Lives in `shared/common/` only — never duplicated |\n\n### Rule 3 — The ACL is the Only Door to External Systems\nAny external API (Eventbrite, payment gateway, SMS provider, etc.) MUST be accessed\nexclusively through the `shared/` ACL package. No module ever calls an external API directly.\nIf a new external integration is needed, it goes in `shared/` first, then modules consume it\nvia the ACL facade services.\n\n### Rule 4 — A Module Owns Its Own Database Tables\nNo two modules share a JPA entity or database table. If Module B needs data from Module A's\ntable, it calls Module A's API — it does NOT import Module A's `@Entity` class or `@Repository`.\nViolating this rule creates hidden coupling at the database layer.\n\n### Rule 5 — The `admin/` Module Owns No Domain\nThe admin module only orchestrates and aggregates. It delegates all writes to the owning module.\nIt never defines its own `@Entity` or owns a database table. It is a read + orchestration layer.\n\nFor inter-module access, admin follows this rule:\n- **Reads** — admin MAY import a module's `@Service` bean directly (same JVM, no overhead)\n- **Writes** — admin MUST call the owning module's REST API (never bypass the module's own validation, events, and business rules)\n\n### Rule 6 — Mapping Logic Belongs in the Mapper Layer Only\nConverting domain objects to API response DTOs and request DTOs to domain objects must be done\nexclusively in the `mapper/` package. Controllers and services must never call `.builder()` on a\nresponse DTO directly or manually map fields.\n- **Controllers** — call service, return result. No mapping.\n- **Services** — orchestrate domain + infra. No mapping.\n- **Mappers** — the only place field translation happens. Use MapStruct.\n\n---\n\n## Project Layout\n\n```\n[project-root]/\n├── pom.xml                    ← Parent POM. All dependency versions managed here only.\n├── shared/                    ← Internal library. Never imports from any module.\n├── [module-name]/             ← One folder per bounded context.\n├── admin/                     ← Thin orchestration layer. Owns no domain, no tables.\n└── app/                       ← Spring Boot entry point. Zero business logic.\n```\n\n---\n\n## shared/ Structure\n\nCross-cutting concerns only. Every module depends on this.\n\n```\nshared/\n└── src/main/java/com/[org]/shared/\n    ├── [external-system-acl]/     ← One package per external system (e.g. razorpay/, eventbrite/)\n    │   ├── client/                ← Raw HTTP calls only\n    │   ├── config/                ← WebClient bean, rate limiter config\n    │   ├── dto/request/           ← External system's raw request shapes\n    │   ├── dto/response/          ← External system's raw response shapes\n    │   ├── mapper/                ← Translates external DTOs → internal domain objects\n    │   ├── service/               ← THE ONLY THING MODULES CALL. One service per capability.\n    │   ├── webhook/               ← Receives inbound webhooks, dispatches as Spring Events\n    │   └── resilience/            ← Circuit breaker + fallback config per external system\n    │\n    ├── security/\n    │   ├── JwtTokenProvider       ← Generate + validate JWTs\n    │   ├── JwtAuthenticationFilter← Spring Security filter, registered once\n    │   └── SecurityConstants      ← Token TTLs, header names, role constants\n    │\n    ├── common/\n    │   ├── domain/\n    │   │   ├── BaseEntity         ← id, createdAt, updatedAt — all entities extend this\n    │   │   └── Money              ← Value object for all monetary amounts. Never use primitives.\n    │   ├── dto/\n    │   │   ├── ApiResponse        ← Standard success response wrapper\n    │   │   ├── PageResponse       ← Paginated list wrapper\n    │   │   └── ErrorResponse      ← Standard error shape\n    │   ├── enums/                 ← Enums shared across 2+ modules only\n    │   └── exception/\n    │       ├── GlobalExceptionHandler  ← @ControllerAdvice. One handler for the entire app.\n    │       ├── ResourceNotFoundException   ← 404\n    │       ├── BusinessRuleException       ← 422\n    │       └── IntegrationException        ← 502\n    │\n    └── config/\n        ├── RedisConfig            ← Shared Redis bean\n        ├── ElasticsearchConfig    ← Shared ES client bean\n        ├── CacheConfig            ← Cache names and TTLs\n        ├── AsyncConfig            ← Thread pool for @Async\n        ├── OpenApiConfig          ← Springdoc global config\n        ├── WebConfig              ← Global CORS + request logging. Never use @CrossOrigin on controllers.\n        └── TracingConfig          ← MDC traceId on every log line. Essential for prod debugging.\n```\n\n---\n\n## [module-name]/ Structure\n\nOne folder per bounded context. com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.BookingStatus;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.domain.BaseEntity;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.BusinessRuleException;\nimport jakarta.persistence.Column;\nimport jakarta.persistence.Entity;\nimport jakarta.persistence.EnumType;\nimport jakarta.persistence.Enumerated;\nimport jakarta.persistence.Table;\n\n@Entity\n@Table(name = \"bookings\")\npublic class Booking extends BaseEntity {\n\n    @Column(name = \"booking_ref\", nullable = false, unique = true)\n    private String bookingRef;\n\n    @Column(name = \"cart_id\", nullable = false)\n    private Long cartId;\n\n    @Column(name = \"user_id\", nullable = false)\n    private Long userId;\n\n    @Column(name = \"event_id\", nullable = false)\n    private Long eventId;\n\n    @Column(name = \"slot_id\", nullable = false)\n    private Long slotId;\n\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\n    @Column(name = \"status\", nullable = false)\n    private BookingStatus status;\n\n    @Column(name = \"stripe_payment_intent_id\")\n    private String stripePaymentIntentId;\n\n    @Column(name = \"stripe_charge_id\")\n    private String stripeChargeId;\n\n    @Column(name = \"total_amount\", nullable = false)\n    private Long totalAmount;\n\n    @Column(name = \"currency\", nullable = false)\n    private String currency;\n\n    protected Booking() {\n    }\n\n    public Booking(String bookingRef, Long cartId, Long userId, Long eventId, Long slotId, Long totalAmount, String currency) {\n        this.bookingRef = bookingRef;\n        this.cartId = cartId;\n        this.userId = userId;\n        this.eventId = eventId;\n        this.slotId = slotId;\n        this.totalAmount = totalAmount;\n        this.currency = currency;\n        this.status = BookingStatus.PENDING;\n    }\n\n    public void confirm(String stripePaymentIntentId, String stripeChargeId) {\n        if (status != BookingStatus.PENDING) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Booking cannot be confirmed from state \" + status, \"INVALID_BOOKING_STATE\");\n        }\n        this.stripePaymentIntentId = stripePaymentIntentId;\n        this.stripeChargeId = stripeChargeId;\n        this.status = BookingStatus.CONFIRMED;\n    }\n\n    public void markCancellationPending() {\n        if (status != BookingStatus.CONFIRMED) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Booking cannot enter cancellation pending from state \" + status, \"INVALID_BOOKING_STATE\");\n        }\n        this.status = BookingStatus.CANCELLATION_PENDING;\n    }\n\n    public void revertCancellationPending() {\n        if (status == BookingStatus.CANCELLATION_PENDING) {\n            this.status = BookingStatus.CONFIRMED;\n        }\n    }\n\n    public void cancel() {\n        if (status != BookingStatus.CANCELLATION_PENDING) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Booking cannot be cancelled from state \" + status, \"INVALID_BOOKING_STATE\");\n        }\n        this.status = BookingStatus.CANCELLED;\n    }\n\n    public void cancelDueToPaymentFailure() {\n        if (status == BookingStatus.CANCELLED) {\n            return;\n        }\n        if (status == BookingStatus.PENDING || status == BookingStatus.CANCELLATION_PENDING || status == BookingStatus.CONFIRMED) {\n            this.status = BookingStatus.CANCELLED;\n            return;\n        }\n        throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Booking cannot be cancelled from state \" + status, \"INVALID_BOOKING_STATE\");\n    }\n\n    public String getBookingRef() {\n        return bookingRef;\n    }\n\n    public Long getCartId() {\n        return cartId;\n    }\n\n    public Long getUserId() {\n        return userId;\n    }\n\n    public Long getEventId() {\n        return eventId;\n    }\n\n    public Long getSlotId() {\n        return slotId;\n    }\n\n    public BookingStatus getStatus() {\n        return status;\n    }\n\n    public String getStripePaymentIntentId() {\n        return stripePaymentIntentId;\n    }\n\n    public String getStripeChargeId() {\n        return stripeChargeId;\n    }\n\n    public Long getTotalAmount() {\n        return totalAmount;\n    }\n\n    public String getCurrency() {\n        return currency;\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}

slotId, Long totalAmount, String currency) {\n        this.bookingRef = bookingRef;\n        this.cartId = cartId;\n        this.userId = userId;\n        this.eventId = eventId;\n        this.slotId = slotId;\n        this.totalAmount = totalAmount;\n        this.currency = currency;\n        this.status = BookingStatus.PENDING;\n    }\n\n    public void confirm(String stripePaymentIntentId, String stripeChargeId) {\n        if (status != BookingStatus.PENDING) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Booking cannot be confirmed from state \" + status, \"INVALID_BOOKING_STATE\");\n        }\n        this.stripePaymentIntentId = stripePaymentIntentId;\n        this.stripeChargeId = stripeChargeId;\n        this.status = BookingStatus.CONFIRMED;\n    }\n\n    public void markCancellationPending() {\n        if (status != BookingStatus.CONFIRMED) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Booking cannot enter cancellation pending from state \" + status, \"INVALID_BOOKING_STATE\");\n        }\n        this.status = BookingStatus.CANCELLATION_PENDING;\n    }\n\n    public void revertCancellationPending() {\n        if (status == BookingStatus.CANCELLATION_PENDING) {\n            this.status = BookingStatus.CONFIRMED;\n        }\n    }\n\n    public void cancel() {\n        if (status != BookingStatus.CANCELLATION_PENDING) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Booking cannot be cancelled from state \" + status, \"INVALID_BOOKING_STATE\");\n        }\n        this.status = BookingStatus.CANCELLED;\n    }\n\n    public void cancelDueToPaymentFailure() {\n        if (status == BookingStatus.CANCELLED) {\n            return;\n        }\n        if (status == BookingStatus.PENDING || status == BookingStatus.CANCELLATION_PENDING || status == BookingStatus.CONFIRMED) {\n            this.status = BookingStatus.CANCELLED;\n            return;\n        }\n        throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Booking cannot be cancelled from state \" + status, \"INVALID_BOOKING_STATE\");\n    }\n\n    public String getBookingRef() {\n        return bookingRef;\n    }\n\n    public Long getCartId() {\n        return cartId;\n    }\n\n    public Long getUserId() {\n        return userId;\n    }\n\n    public Long getEventId() {\n        return eventId;\n    }\n\n    public Long getSlotId() {\n        return slotId;\n    }\n\n    public BookingStatus getStatus() {\n        return status;\n    }\n\n    public String getStripePaymentIntentId() {\n        return stripePaymentIntentId;\n    }\n\n    public String getStripeChargeId() {\n        return stripeChargeId;\n    }\n\n    public Long getTotalAmount() {\n        return totalAmount;\n    }\n\n    public String getCurrency() {\n        return currency;\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}

{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T20:06:49.578Z",

  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call_output",
    "call_id": "call_DXijGO9xHpanor8NRaTyZStb",
    "output": "Chunk ID: 1684b6\nWall time: 0.0529 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 2347\nOutput:\npackage com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.service;\n\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.api.dto.response.CancellationResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.api.dto.response.RefundResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.Booking;\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.BookingItem;\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.CancellationRequest;\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.ETicket;\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.Refund;\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.BookingStatus;\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.RefundReason;\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.RefundStatus;\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.exception.BookingNotFoundException;\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.exception.CancellationNotAllowedException;\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.exception.RefundFailedException;\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.repository.BookingItemRepository;\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.repository.BookingRepository;\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.repository.CancellationRequestRepository;\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.repository.ETicketRepository;\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.repository.RefundRepository;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.BookingCancelledEvent;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.stripe.dto.StripeRefundRequest;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.stripe.dto.StripeRefundResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.stripe.exception.StripeIntegrationException;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.stripe.service.StripeRefundService;\nimport java.time.Instant;\nimport java.util.List;\nimport java.util.Map;\nimport java.util.Objects;\nimport org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;\nimport org.springframework.core.ParameterizedTypeReference;\nimport org.springframework.http.HttpStatusCode;\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\nimport org.springframework.web.client.RestClient;\n\n@Service\npublic class CancellationService {\n\n    private final BookingRepository bookingRepository;\n    private final BookingItemRepository bookingItemRepository;\n    private final ETicketRepository eTicketRepository;\n    private final RefundRepository refundRepository;\n    private final CancellationRequestRepository cancellationRequestRepository;\n    private final StripeRefundService stripeRefundService;\n    private final AfterCommitEventPublisher afterCommitEventPublisher;\n    private final RestClient restClient;\n    private final int cancellationWindowHours;\n    private final int feePercent;\n\n    public CancellationService(\n        BookingRepository bookingRepository,\n        BookingItemRepository bookingItemRepository,\n        ETicketRepository eTicketRepository,\n        RefundRepository refundRepository,\n        CancellationRequestRepository cancellationRequestRepository,\n        StripeRefundService stripeRefundService,\n        AfterCommitEventPublisher afterCommitEventPublisher,\n        @Value(\"${app.internal-base-url:http://localhost:8080}\") String internalBaseUrl,\n        @Value(\"${payments.cancellation.window-hours:24}\") int cancellationWindowHours,\n        @Value(\"${payments.cancellation.fee-percent:0}\") int feePercent\n    ) {\n        this.bookingRepository = bookingRepository;\n        this.bookingItemRepository = bookingItemRepository;\n        this.eTicketRepository = eTicketRepository;\n        this.refundRepository = refundRepository;\n        this.cancellationRequestRepository = cancellationRequestRepository;\n        this.stripeRefundService = stripeRefundService;\n        this.afterCommitEventPublisher = afterCommitEventPublisher;\n        this.restClient = RestClient.builder().baseUrl(internalBaseUrl).build();\n        this.cancellationWindowHours = cancellationWindowHours;\n        this.feePercent = feePercent;\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public CancellationResponse cancel(Long userId, String bookingRef, RefundReason reason) {\n        Booking booking = bookingRepository.findByBookingRef(bookingRef)\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new BookingNotFoundException(bookingRef));\n\n        if (!Objects.equals(booking.getUserId(), userId)) {\n            throw new BookingNotFoundException(bookingRef);\n        }\n        if (booking.getStatus() != BookingStatus.CONFIRMED) {\n            throw new CancellationNotAllowedException(\"Booking is not in CONFIRMED state\", Map.of(\"currentStatus\", booking.getStatus().name()));\n        }\n\n        SlotTimingResponse slotTiming = fetchSlotTiming(booking.getSlotId());\n        Instant windowClosedAt = slotTiming.startTime().minusSeconds(cancellationWindowHours * 3600L);\n        if (!Instant.now().isBefore(windowClosedAt)) {\n            throw new CancellationNotAllowedException(\n                \"Cancellation window has closed\",\n                Map.of(\"windowClosedAt\", windowClosedAt.toString())\n            );\n        }\n\n        CancellationRequest cancellationRequest = new CancellationRequest(booking.getId(), userId, reason);\n        cancellationRequestRepository.save(cancellationRequest);\n        booking.markCancellationPending();\n\n        long refundAmount = booking.getTotalAmount() - ((booking.getTotalAmount() * feePercent) / 100);\n\n        try {\n            StripeRefundResponse stripeRefund = stripeRefundService.createRefund(new StripeRefundRequest(\n                booking.getStripePaymentIntentId(),\n                refundAmount,\n                reason.name().toLowerCase(),\n                \"refund-\" + booking.getBookingRef()\n            ));\n\n            RefundStatus refundStatus = toRefundStatus(stripeRefund.status());\n            Refund refund = refundRepository.save(new Refund(\n                booking.getId(),\n                stripeRefund.refundId(),\n                refundAmount,\n                booking.getCurrency(),\n                reason,\n                refundStatus\n            ));\n\n            cancellationRequest.approve();\n            if (refundStatus == RefundStatus.SUCCEEDED) {\n                finaliseAfterRefund(booking.getId());\n            }\n\n            return new CancellationResponse(\n                booking.getBookingRef(),\n                booking.getStatus(),\n                new RefundResponse(refund.getStripeRefundId(), refund.getAmount(), refund.getCurrency(), refund.getStatus())\n            );\n        } catch (StripeIntegrationException ex) {\n            booking.revertCancellationPending();\n            cancellationRequest.reject();\n            throw new RefundFailedException(\"Unable to process refund at this time. Please contact support.\", ex.getMessage());\n        }\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public void finaliseAfterRefund(Long bookingId) {\n        Booking booking = bookingRepository.findById(bookingId)\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new BookingNotFoundException(bookingId));\n\n        if (booking.getStatus() == BookingStatus.CANCELLED) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        booking.cancel();\n\n        List<Long> seatIds = bookingItemRepository.findByBookingId(bookingId).stream()\n            .peek(BookingItem::cancel)\n            .map(BookingItem::getSeatId)\n            .filter(Objects::nonNull)\n            .toList();\n\n        eTicketRepository.findByBookingId(bookingId).forEach(ETicket::voidTicket);\n\n        refundRepository.findByBookingId(bookingId).ifPresent(refund -> refund.updateStatus(RefundStatus.SUCCEEDED));\n        cancellationRequestRepository.findTopByBookingIdOrderByRequestedAtDesc(bookingId).ifPresent(CancellationRequest::approve);\n\n        afterCommitEventPublisher.publish(new BookingCancelledEvent(\n            booking.getId(),\n            booking.getCartId(),\n            seatIds,\n            booking.getUserId(),\n            \"BUYER_CANCEL\"\n        ));\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public void handleRefundFailed(String refundId) {\n        refundRepository.findByStripeRefundId(refundId).ifPresent(refund -> {\n            refund.updateStatus(RefundStatus.FAILED);\n            cancellationRequestRepository.findTopByBookingIdOrderByRequestedAtDesc(refund.getBookingId())\n                .ifPresent(CancellationRequest::reject);\n        });\n    }\n\n    private SlotTimingResponse fetchSlotTiming(Long slotId) {\n        SlotTimingResponse response = restClient.get()\n            .uri(\"/internal/scheduling/slots/{slotId}/timing\", slotId)\n            .retrieve()\n            .onStatus(HttpStatusCode::isError, (request, httpResponse) -> {\n                throw new CancellationNotAllowedException(\"Unable to validate cancellation window\");\n            })\n            .body(new ParameterizedTypeReference<>() {\n            });\n        if (response == null || response.startTime() == null) {\n            throw new CancellationNotAllowedException(\"Unable to validate cancellation window\");\n        }\n        return response;\n    }\n\n    private RefundStatus toRefundStatus(String stripeStatus) {\n        if (\"succeeded\".equalsIgnoreCase(stripeStatus)) {\n            return RefundStatus.SUCCEEDED;\n        }\n        if (\"failed\".equalsIgnoreCase(stripeStatus) || \"canceled\".equalsIgnoreCase(stripeStatus)) {\n            return RefundStatus.FAILED;\n        }\n        return RefundStatus.PENDING;\n    }\n\n    public record SlotTimingResponse(Long slotId, Instant startTime) {\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}

slotTiming.startTime().minusSeconds(cancellationWindowHours * 3600L);\n        if (!Instant.now().isBefore(windowClosedAt)) {\n            throw new CancellationNotAllowedException(\n                \"Cancellation window has closed\",\n                Map.of(\"windowClosedAt\", windowClosedAt.toString())\n            );\n        }\n\n        CancellationRequest cancellationRequest = new CancellationRequest(booking.getId(), userId, reason);\n        cancellationRequestRepository.save(cancellationRequest);\n        booking.markCancellationPending();\n\n        long refundAmount = booking.getTotalAmount() - ((booking.getTotalAmount() * feePercent) / 100);\n\n        try {\n            StripeRefundResponse stripeRefund = stripeRefundService.createRefund(new StripeRefundRequest(\n                booking.getStripePaymentIntentId(),\n                refundAmount,\n                reason.name().toLowerCase(),\n                \"refund-\" + booking.getBookingRef()\n            ));\n\n            RefundStatus refundStatus = toRefundStatus(stripeRefund.status());\n            Refund refund = refundRepository.save(new Refund(\n                booking.getId(),\n                stripeRefund.refundId(),\n                refundAmount,\n                booking.getCurrency(),\n                reason,\n                refundStatus\n            ));\n\n            cancellationRequest.approve();\n            if (refundStatus == RefundStatus.SUCCEEDED) {\n                finaliseAfterRefund(booking.getId());\n            }\n\n            return new CancellationResponse(\n                booking.getBookingRef(),\n                booking.getStatus(),\n                new RefundResponse(refund.getStripeRefundId(), refund.getAmount(), refund.getCurrency(), refund.getStatus())\n            );\n        } catch (StripeIntegrationException ex) {\n            booking.revertCancellationPending();\n            cancellationRequest.reject();\n            throw new RefundFailedException(\"Unable to process refund at this time. Please contact support.\", ex.getMessage());\n        }\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public void finaliseAfterRefund(Long bookingId) {\n        Booking booking = bookingRepository.findById(bookingId)\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new BookingNotFoundException(bookingId));\n\n        if (booking.getStatus() == BookingStatus.CANCELLED) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        booking.cancel();\n\n        List<Long> seatIds = bookingItemRepository.findByBookingId(bookingId).stream()\n            .peek(BookingItem::cancel)\n            .map(BookingItem::getSeatId)\n            .filter(Objects::nonNull)\n            .toList();\n\n        eTicketRepository.findByBookingId(bookingId).forEach(ETicket::voidTicket);\n\n        refundRepository.findByBookingId(bookingId).ifPresent(refund -> refund.updateStatus(RefundStatus.SUCCEEDED));\n        cancellationRequestRepository.findTopByBookingIdOrderByRequestedAtDesc(bookingId).ifPresent(CancellationRequest::approve);\n\n        afterCommitEventPublisher.publish(new BookingCancelledEvent(\n            booking.getId(),\n            booking.getCartId(),\n            seatIds,\n            booking.getUserId(),\n            \"BUYER_CANCEL\"\n        ));\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public void handleRefundFailed(String refundId) {\n        refundRepository.findByStripeRefundId(refundId).ifPresent(refund -> {\n            refund.updateStatus(RefundStatus.FAILED);\n            cancellationRequestRepository.findTopByBookingIdOrderByRequestedAtDesc(refund.getBookingId())\n                .ifPresent(CancellationRequest::reject);\n        });\n    }\n\n    private SlotTimingResponse fetchSlotTiming(Long slotId) {\n        SlotTimingResponse response = restClient.get()\n            .uri(\"/internal/scheduling/slots/{slotId}/timing\", slotId)\n            .retrieve()\n            .onStatus(HttpStatusCode::isError, (request, httpResponse) -> {\n                throw new CancellationNotAllowedException(\"Unable to validate cancellation window\");\n            })\n            .body(new ParameterizedTypeReference<>() {\n            });\n        if (response == null || response.startTime() == null) {\n            throw new CancellationNotAllowedException(\"Unable to validate cancellation window\");\n        }\n        return response;\n    }\n\n    private RefundStatus toRefundStatus(String stripeStatus) {\n        if (\"succeeded\".equalsIgnoreCase(stripeStatus)) {\n            return RefundStatus.SUCCEEDED;\n        }\n        if (\"failed\".equalsIgnoreCase(stripeStatus) || \"canceled\".equalsIgnoreCase(stripeStatus)) {\n            return RefundStatus.FAILED;\n        }\n        return RefundStatus.PENDING;\n    }\n\n    public record SlotTimingResponse(Long slotId, Instant startTime) {\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}
```

    "output": "Chunk ID: 608727\nWall time: 0.0517 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 3637\nOutput:\npackage com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.service;\n\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.api.dto.response.BookingItemResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.api.dto.response.BookingResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.api.dto.response.CheckoutInitResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.api.dto.response.ETicketResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.Booking;\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.BookingItem;\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.ETicket;\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.Payment;\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.BookingStatus;\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.PaymentStatus;\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.exception.BookingNotFoundException;\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.exception.CartItemsFetchException;\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.exception.PaymentIntentNotFoundException;\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.exception.PaymentNotConfirmedException;\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.mapper.BookingMapper;\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.mapper.ETicketMapper;\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.repository.BookingItemRepository;\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.repository.BookingRepository;\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.repository.ETicketRepository;\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.repository.PaymentRepository;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.dto.CartItemSnapshotDto;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.BookingConfirmedEvent;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.CartAssembledEvent;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.PaymentFailedEvent;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.service.CartSnapshotReader;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.service.SlotSummaryReader;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.stripe.dto.StripePaymentIntentRequest;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.stripe.dto.StripePaymentIntentResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.stripe.service.StripePaymentService;\nimport java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets;\nimport java.util.ArrayList;\nimport java.util.Base64;\nimport java.util.HashMap;\nimport java.util.List;\nimport java.util.Map;\nimport java.util.Objects;\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\n\n@Service\npublic class PaymentService {\n\n    private final BookingRepository bookingRepository;\n    private final PaymentRepository paymentRepository;\n    private final BookingItemRepository bookingItemRepository;\n    private final ETicketRepository eTicketRepository;\n    private final StripePaymentService stripePaymentService;\n    private final BookingMapper bookingMapper;\n    private final ETicketMapper eTicketMapper;\n    private final AfterCommitEventPublisher afterCommitEventPublisher;\n    private final BookingRefGenerator bookingRefGenerator;\n    private final SlotSummaryReader slotSummaryReader;\n    private final CartSnapshotReader cartSnapshotReader;\n\n    public PaymentService(\n        BookingRepository bookingRepository,\n        PaymentRepository paymentRepository,\n        BookingItemRepository bookingItemRepository,\n        ETicketRepository eTicketRepository,\n        StripePaymentService stripePaymentService,\n        BookingMapper bookingMapper,\n        ETicketMapper eTicketMapper,\n        AfterCommitEventPublisher afterCommitEventPublisher,\n        BookingRefGenerator bookingRefGenerator,\n        SlotSummaryReader slotSummaryReader,\n        CartSnapshotReader cartSnapshotReader\n    ) {\n        this.bookingRepository = bookingRepository;\n        this.paymentRepository = paymentRepository;\n        this.bookingItemRepository = bookingItemRepository;\n        this.eTicketRepository = eTicketRepository;\n        this.stripePaymentService = stripePaymentService;\n        this.bookingMapper = bookingMapper;\n        this.eTicketMapper = eTicketMapper;\n        this.afterCommitEventPublisher = afterCommitEventPublisher;\n        this.bookingRefGenerator = bookingRefGenerator;\n        this.slotSummaryReader = slotSummaryReader;\n        this.cartSnapshotReader = cartSnapshotReader;\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public CheckoutInitResponse createCheckout(CartAssembledEvent event) {\n        Booking existingBooking = bookingRepository.findByCartId(event.cartId()).orElse(null);\n        if (existingBooking != null) {\n            Payment existingPayment = paymentRepository.findByBookingId(existingBooking.getId()).orElse(null);\n            if (existingPayment != null && (existingPayment.getStatus() == PaymentStatus.PENDING || existingPayment.getStatus() == PaymentStatus.SUCCESS)) {\n                StripePaymentIntentResponse paymentIntent = stripePaymentService.getPaymentIntent(existingPayment.getStripePaymentIntentId());\n                return new CheckoutInitResponse(\n                    event.cartId(),\n                    existingBooking.getBookingRef(),\n                    existingPayment.getStripePaymentIntentId(),\n                    paymentIntent.clientSecret(),\n                    existingPayment.getAmount(),\n                    existingPayment.getCurrency()\n                );\n            }\n        }\n\n        String bookingRef = bookingRefGenerator.nextRef();\n        Long eventId = event.slotId();\n        if (slotSummaryReader.getSlotSummary(event.slotId()) == null) {\n            throw new CartItemsFetchException(\"Unable to resolve slot details for cart=\" + event.cartId());\n        }\n\n        Booking booking = bookingRepository.save(new Booking(\n            bookingRef,\n            event.cartId(),\n            event.userId(),\n            eventId,\n            event.slotId(),\n            event.totalAmountInSmallestUnit(),\n            event.currency()\n        ));\n\n        StripePaymentIntentRequest request = new StripePaymentIntentRequest(\n            event.totalAmountInSmallestUnit(),\n            event.currency(),\n            event.userEmail(),\n            \"Booking \" + bookingRef,\n            \"cart-\" + event.cartId(),\n            Map.of(\n                \"booking_ref\", bookingRef,\n                \"user_id\", String.valueOf(event.userId())\n            )\n        );\n        StripePaymentIntentResponse paymentIntent = stripePaymentService.createPaymentIntent(request);\n\n        Payment payment = new Payment(\n            booking.getId(),\n            paymentIntent.paymentIntentId(),\n            event.totalAmountInSmallestUnit(),\n            event.currency()\n        );\n        paymentRepository.save(payment);\n\n        return new CheckoutInitResponse(\n            event.cartId(),\n            bookingRef,\n            paymentIntent.paymentIntentId(),\n            paymentIntent.clientSecret(),\n            event.totalAmountInSmallestUnit(),\n            event.currency()\n        );\n    }\n\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\n    public CheckoutInitResponse getCheckout(Long cartId, Long userId) {\n        Booking booking = bookingRepository.findByCartId(cartId).orElseThrow(() -> new BookingNotFoundException(\"cart-\" + cartId));\n        if (!Objects.equals(booking.getUserId(), userId)) {\n            throw new BookingNotFoundException(booking.getBookingRef());\n        }\n        Payment payment = paymentRepository.findByBookingId(booking.getId())\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new PaymentIntentNotFoundException(\"cart-\" + cartId));\n\n        StripePaymentIntentResponse paymentIntent = stripePaymentService.getPaymentIntent(payment.getStripePaymentIntentId());\n        return new CheckoutInitResponse(\n            cartId,\n            booking.getBookingRef(),\n            payment.getStripePaymentIntentId(),\n            paymentIntent.clientSecret(),\n            payment.getAmount(),\n            payment.getCurrency()\n        );\n    }\n\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\n    public BookingResponse getBookingResponse(Long userId, String bookingRef) {\n        Booking booking = bookingRepository.findByBookingRef(bookingRef)\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new BookingNotFoundException(bookingRef));\n        if (!Objects.equals(booking.getUserId(), userId)) {\n            throw new BookingNotFoundException(bookingRef);\n        }\n        return buildBookingResponse(booking);\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public BookingResponse confirmPayment(Long userId, String paymentIntentId) {\n        Payment payment = paymentRepository.findByStripePaymentIntentId(paymentIntentId)\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new PaymentIntentNotFoundException(paymentIntentId));\n        Booking booking = bookingRepository.findById(payment.getBookingId())\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new BookingNotFoundException(payment.getBookingId()));\n\n        if (!Objects.equals(booking.getUserId(), userId)) {\n            throw new BookingNotFoundException(booking.getBookingRef());\n        }\n\n        if (payment.getStatus() == PaymentStatus.SUCCESS && booking.getStatus() == BookingStatus.CONFIRMED) {\n            return buildBookingResponse(booking);\n        }\n\n        StripePaymentIntentResponse stripePaymentIntent = stripePaymentService.getPaymentIntent(paymentIntentId);\n        if (!\"succeeded\".equalsIgnoreCase(stripePaymentIntent.status())) {\n            throw new PaymentNotConfirmedException(stripePaymentIntent.status());\n        }\n\n        payment.markSuccess(stripePaymentIntent.latestCharge());\n        booking.confirm(paymentIntentId, stripePaymentIntent.latestCharge());\n\n        List<CartItemSnapshotDto> cartItems = cartSnapshotReader.getCartItems(booking.getCartId());\n        if (cartItems.isEmpty()) {\n            throw new CartItemsFetchException(\"No cart items found for cart=\" + booking.getCartId());\n        }\n\n        List<Long> seatIds = new ArrayList<>();\n        for (CartItemSnapshotDto cartItem : cartItems) {\n            int quantity = cartItem.quantity() == null || cartItem.quantity() < 1 ? 1 : cartItem.quantity();\n            for (int i = 0; i < quantity; i++) {\n                BookingItem item = bookingItemRepository.save(new BookingItem(\n                    booking.getId(),\n                    cartItem.seatId(),\n                    cartItem.gaClaimId(),\n                    cartItem.ticketClassId(),\n                    cartItem.unitPrice(),\n                    cartItem.currency()\n                ));\n\n                String rawQrData = booking.getBookingRef() + \":\" + item.getId();\n                String encodedQrData = Base64.getEncoder().encodeToString(rawQrData.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8));\n                ETicket eTicket = new ETicket(\n                    booking.getId(),\n                    item.getId(),\n                    encodedQrData,\n                    \"/tickets/\" + booking.getBookingRef() + \"/\" + item.getId() + \".pdf\"\n                );\n                eTicketRepository.save(eTicket);\n\n                if (item.getSeatId() != null) {\n                    seatIds.add(item.getSeatId());\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        afterCommitEventPublisher.publish(new BookingConfirmedEvent(\n            booking.getCartId(),\n            seatIds,\n            paymentIntentId,\n            booking.getUserId()\n        ));\n\n        return buildBookingResponse(booking);\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public BookingResponse confirmPaymentFromWebhook(String paymentIntentId) {\n        Payment payment = paymentRepository.findByStripePaymentIntentId(paymentIntentId)\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new PaymentIntentNotFoundException(paymentIntentId));\n        Booking booking = bookingRepository.findById(payment.getBookingId())\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new BookingNotFoundException(payment.getBookingId()));\n        return confirmPayment(booking.getUserId(), paymentIntentId);\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public void handleFailure(String paymentIntentId, String failureCode, String failureMessage) {\n        Payment payment = paymentRepository.findByStripePaymentIntentId(paymentIntentId)\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new PaymentIntentNotFoundException(paymentIntentId));\n\n        if (payment.getStatus() == PaymentStatus.FAILED) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        Booking booking = bookingRepository.findById(payment.getBookingId())\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new BookingNotFoundException(payment.getBookingId()));\n\n        payment.markFailed(failureCode, failureMessage);\n        booking.cancelDueToPaymentFailure();\n\n        List<Long> seatIds = bookingItemRepository.findByBookingId(booking.getId())\n            .stream()\n            .map(BookingItem::getSeatId)\n            .filter(Objects::nonNull)\n            .toList();\n\n        afterCommitEventPublisher.publish(new PaymentFailedEvent(booking.getCartId(), seatIds, booking.getUserId()));\n    }\n\n    private BookingResponse buildBookingResponse(Booking booking) {\n        BookingResponse response = bookingMapper.toResponse(booking);\n\n        Map<Long, ETicket> ticketsByBookingItemId = eTicketRepository.findByBookingId(booking.getId()).stream()\n            .collect(java.util.stream.Collectors.toMap(ETicket::getBookingItemId, ticket -> ticket, (a, b) -> a, HashMap::new));\n\n        List<BookingItemResponse> items = bookingItemRepository.findByBookingId(booking.getId()).stream()\n            .map(item -> {\n                ETicket ticket = ticketsByBookingItemId.get(item.getId());\n                ETicketResponse mappedTicket = ticket == null ? null : withTicketCode(eTicketMapper.toResponse(ticket), booking.getBookingRef(), item.getId());\n                return new BookingItemResponse(\n                    item.getId(),\n                    item.getSeatId(),\n                    item.getGaClaimId(),\n                    item.getTicketClassId(),\n                    item.getUnitPrice(),\n                    item.getCurrency(),\n                    item.getStatus(),\n                    mappedTicket\n                );\n            })\n            .toList();\n\n        return new BookingResponse(\n            response.bookingRef(),\n            response.status(),\n            response.slotId(),\n            response.totalAmount(),\n            response.currency(),\n            response.stripePaymentIntentId(),\n            items,\n            response.createdAt()\n        );\n    }\n\n    private ETicketResponse withTicketCode(ETicketResponse rawResponse, String bookingRef, Long bookingItemId) {\n        return new ETicketResponse(\n            bookingRef + \":\" + bookingItemId,\n            bookingItemId,\n            rawResponse.qrCodeData(),\n            rawResponse.pdfUrl(),\n            rawResponse.status()\n        );\n    }\n\n}\n"
  }
}

this.eTicketRepository = eTicketRepository;\n        this.stripePaymentService = stripePaymentService;\n        this.bookingMapper = bookingMapper;\n        this.eTicketMapper = eTicketMapper;\n        this.afterCommitEventPublisher = afterCommitEventPublisher;\n        this.bookingRefGenerator = bookingRefGenerator;\n        this.slotSummaryReader = slotSummaryReader;\n        this.cartSnapshotReader = cartSnapshotReader;\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public CheckoutInitResponse createCheckout(CartAssembledEvent event) {\n        Booking existingBooking = bookingRepository.findByCartId(event.cartId()).orElse(null);\n        if (existingBooking != null) {\n            Payment existingPayment = paymentRepository.findByBookingId(existingBooking.getId()).orElse(null);\n            if (existingPayment != null && (existingPayment.getStatus() == PaymentStatus.PENDING || existingPayment.getStatus() == PaymentStatus.SUCCESS)) {\n                StripePaymentIntentResponse paymentIntent = stripePaymentService.getPaymentIntent(existingPayment.getStripePaymentIntentId());\n                return new CheckoutInitResponse(\n                    event.cartId(),\n                    existingBooking.getBookingRef(),\n                    existingPayment.getStripePaymentIntentId(),\n                    paymentIntent.clientSecret(),\n                    existingPayment.getAmount(),\n                    existingPayment.getCurrency()\n                );\n            }\n        }\n\n        String bookingRef = bookingRefGenerator.nextRef();\n        Long eventId = event.slotId();\n        if (slotSummaryReader.getSlotSummary(event.slotId()) == null) {\n            throw new CartItemsFetchException(\"Unable to resolve slot details for cart=\" + event.cartId());\n        }\n\n        Booking booking = bookingRepository.save(new Booking(\n            bookingRef,\n            event.cartId(),\n            event.userId(),\n            eventId,\n            event.slotId(),\n            event.totalAmountInSmallestUnit(),\n            event.currency()\n        ));\n\n        StripePaymentIntentRequest request = new StripePaymentIntentRequest(\n            event.totalAmountInSmallestUnit(),\n            event.currency(),\n            event.userEmail(),\n            \"Booking \" + bookingRef,\n            \"cart-\" + event.cartId(),\n            Map.of(\n                \"booking_ref\", bookingRef,\n                \"user_id\", String.valueOf(event.userId())\n            )\n        );\n        StripePaymentIntentResponse paymentIntent = stripePaymentService.createPaymentIntent(request);\n\n        Payment payment = new Payment(\n            booking.getId(),\n            paymentIntent.paymentIntentId(),\n            event.totalAmountInSmallestUnit(),\n            event.currency()\n        );\n        paymentRepository.save(payment);\n\n        return new CheckoutInitResponse(\n            event.cartId(),\n            bookingRef,\n            paymentIntent.paymentIntentId(),\n            paymentIntent.clientSecret(),\n            event.totalAmountInSmallestUnit(),\n            event.currency()\n        );\n    }\n\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\n    public CheckoutInitResponse getCheckout(Long cartId, Long userId) {\n        Booking booking = bookingRepository.findByCartId(cartId).orElseThrow(() -> new BookingNotFoundException(\"cart-\" + cartId));\n        if (!Objects.equals(booking.getUserId(), userId)) {\n            throw new BookingNotFoundException(booking.getBookingRef());\n        }\n        Payment payment = paymentRepository.findByBookingId(booking.getId())\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new PaymentIntentNotFoundException(\"cart-\" + cartId));\n\n        StripePaymentIntentResponse paymentIntent = stripePaymentService.getPaymentIntent(payment.getStripePaymentIntentId());\n        return new CheckoutInitResponse(\n            cartId,\n            booking.getBookingRef(),\n            payment.getStripePaymentIntentId(),\n            paymentIntent.clientSecret(),\n            payment.getAmount(),\n            payment.getCurrency()\n        );\n    }\n\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\n    public BookingResponse getBookingResponse(Long userId, String bookingRef) {\n        Booking booking = bookingRepository.findByBookingRef(bookingRef)\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new BookingNotFoundException(bookingRef));\n        if (!Objects.equals(booking.getUserId(), userId)) {\n            throw new BookingNotFoundException(bookingRef);\n        }\n        return buildBookingResponse(booking);\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public BookingResponse confirmPayment(Long userId, String paymentIntentId) {\n        Payment payment = paymentRepository.findByStripePaymentIntentId(paymentIntentId)\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new PaymentIntentNotFoundException(paymentIntentId));\n        Booking booking = bookingRepository.findById(payment.getBookingId())\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new BookingNotFoundException(payment.getBookingId()));\n\n        if (!Objects.equals(booking.getUserId(), userId)) {\n            throw new BookingNotFoundException(booking.getBookingRef());\n        }\n\n        if (payment.getStatus() == PaymentStatus.SUCCESS && booking.getStatus() == BookingStatus.CONFIRMED) {\n            return buildBookingResponse(booking);\n        }\n\n        StripePaymentIntentResponse stripePaymentIntent = stripePaymentService.getPaymentIntent(paymentIntentId);\n        if (!\"succeeded\".equalsIgnoreCase(stripePaymentIntent.status())) {\n            throw new PaymentNotConfirmedException(stripePaymentIntent.status());\n        }\n\n        payment.markSuccess(stripePaymentIntent.latestCharge());\n        booking.confirm(paymentIntentId, stripePaymentIntent.latestCharge());\n\n        List<CartItemSnapshotDto> cartItems = cartSnapshotReader.getCartItems(booking.getCartId());\n        if (cartItems.isEmpty()) {\n            throw new CartItemsFetchException(\"No cart items found for cart=\" + booking.getCartId());\n        }\n\n        List<Long> seatIds = new ArrayList<>();\n        for (CartItemSnapshotDto cartItem : cartItems) {\n            int quantity = cartItem.quantity() == null || cartItem.quantity() < 1 ? 1 : cartItem.quantity();\n            for (int i = 0; i < quantity; i++) {\n                BookingItem item = bookingItemRepository.save(new BookingItem(\n                    booking.getId(),\n                    cartItem.seatId(),\n                    cartItem.gaClaimId(),\n                    cartItem.ticketClassId(),\n                    cartItem.unitPrice(),\n                    cartItem.currency()\n                ));\n\n                String rawQrData = booking.getBookingRef() + \":\" + item.getId();\n                String encodedQrData = Base64.getEncoder().encodeToString(rawQrData.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8));\n                ETicket eTicket = new ETicket(\n                    booking.getId(),\n                    item.getId(),\n                    encodedQrData,\n                    \"/tickets/\" + booking.getBookingRef() + \"/\" + item.getId() + \".pdf\"\n                );\n                eTicketRepository.save(eTicket);\n\n                if (item.getSeatId() != null) {\n                    seatIds.add(item.getSeatId());\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        afterCommitEventPublisher.publish(new BookingConfirmedEvent(\n            booking.getCartId(),\n            seatIds,\n            paymentIntentId,\n            booking.getUserId()\n        ));\n\n        return buildBookingResponse(booking);\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public BookingResponse confirmPaymentFromWebhook(String paymentIntentId) {\n        Payment payment = paymentRepository.findByStripePaymentIntentId(paymentIntentId)\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new PaymentIntentNotFoundException(paymentIntentId));\n        Booking booking = bookingRepository.findById(payment.getBookingId())\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new BookingNotFoundException(payment.getBookingId()));\n        return confirmPayment(booking.getUserId(), paymentIntentId);\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public void handleFailure(String paymentIntentId, String failureCode, String failureMessage) {\n        Payment payment = paymentRepository.findByStripePaymentIntentId(paymentIntentId)\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new PaymentIntentNotFoundException(paymentIntentId));\n\n        if (payment.getStatus() == PaymentStatus.FAILED) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        Booking booking = bookingRepository.findById(payment.getBookingId())\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new BookingNotFoundException(payment.getBookingId()));\n\n        payment.markFailed(failureCode, failureMessage);\n        booking.cancelDueToPaymentFailure();\n\n        List<Long> seatIds = bookingItemRepository.findByBookingId(booking.getId())\n            .stream()\n            .map(BookingItem::getSeatId)\n            .filter(Objects::nonNull)\n            .toList();\n\n        afterCommitEventPublisher.publish(new PaymentFailedEvent(booking.getCartId(), seatIds, booking.getUserId()));\n    }\n\n    private BookingResponse buildBookingResponse(Booking booking) {\n        BookingResponse response = bookingMapper.toResponse(booking);\n\n        Map<Long, ETicket> ticketsByBookingItemId = eTicketRepository.findByBookingId(booking.getId()).stream()\n            .collect(java.util.stream.Collectors.toMap(ETicket::getBookingItemId, ticket -> ticket, (a, b) -> a, HashMap::new));\n\n        List<BookingItemResponse> items = bookingItemRepository.findByBookingId(booking.getId()).stream()\n            .map(item -> {\n                ETicket ticket = ticketsByBookingItemId.get(item.getId());\n                ETicketResponse mappedTicket = ticket == null ? null : withTicketCode(eTicketMapper.toResponse(ticket), booking.getBookingRef(), item.getId());\n                return new BookingItemResponse(\n                    item.getId(),\n                    item.getSeatId(),\n                    item.getGaClaimId(),\n                    item.getTicketClassId(),\n                    item.getUnitPrice(),\n                    item.getCurrency(),\n                    item.getStatus(),\n                    mappedTicket\n                );\n            })\n            .toList();\n\n        return new BookingResponse(\n            response.bookingRef(),\n            response.status(),\n            response.slotId(),\n            response.totalAmount(),\n            response.currency(),\n            response.stripePaymentIntentId(),\n            items,\n            response.createdAt()\n        );\n    }\n\n    private ETicketResponse withTicketCode(ETicketResponse rawResponse, String bookingRef, Long bookingItemId) {\n        return new ETicketResponse(\n            bookingRef + \":\" + bookingItemId,\n            bookingItemId,\n            rawResponse.qrCodeData(),\n            rawResponse.pdfUrl(),\n            rawResponse.status()\n        );\n    }\n\n}\n"
  }
}

    "call_id": "call_bpkvpNCSW7e5pyF4bKkRV5df",
    "output": "Chunk ID: cee810\nWall time: 0.0518 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 251\nOutput:\n-- FR5: bookings table — one record per confirmed purchase\nCREATE TABLE bookings (\n    id                       BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,\n    booking_ref              VARCHAR(50)  NOT NULL UNIQUE,\n    cart_id                  BIGINT       NOT NULL,\n    user_id                  BIGINT       NOT NULL,\n    event_id                 BIGINT       NOT NULL,\n    slot_id                  BIGINT       NOT NULL,\n    status                   VARCHAR(30)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING',\n    stripe_payment_intent_id VARCHAR(255),\n    stripe_charge_id         VARCHAR(255),\n    total_amount             BIGINT       NOT NULL,\n    currency                 VARCHAR(10)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 'INR',\n    created_at               TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),\n    updated_at               TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()\n);\n\nCREATE INDEX idx_bookings_user_id     ON bookings(user_id);\nCREATE INDEX idx_bookings_cart_id     ON bookings(cart_id);\nCREATE INDEX idx_bookings_booking_ref ON bookings(booking_ref);\n"
  }
}
```

@PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.ADMIN + \"')\")\n    public OrgAuthStatusResponse status(@PathVariable(\"orgId\") Long orgId) {\n        OrganizationAuth auth = orgOAuthService.getStatus(orgId);\n     "output": "Chunk ID: 634899\nWall time: 0.0518 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 1887\nOutput:\npackage com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.controller;\n\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.request.CreateShowSlotRequest;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.request.UpdateShowSlotRequest;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.response.ShowSlotCancelResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.response.ShowSlotOccurrenceListResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.response.ShowSlotOccurrenceResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.response.ShowSlotPricingTierResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.response.ShowSlotResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.response.ShowSlotRetryResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.response.ShowSlotSubmitResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.ShowSlot;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.ShowSlotOccurrence;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.enums.ShowSlotStatus;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.mapper.ShowSlotMapper;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.service.ShowSlotService;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.service.ShowSlotUpdateResult;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.dto.PageResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.security.Roles;\nimport jakarta.validation.Valid;\nimport java.time.ZonedDateTime;\nimport java.util.List;\nimport org.springframework.data.domain.Page;\nimport org.springframework.format.annotation.DateTimeFormat;\nimport org.springframework.http.HttpStatus;\nimport org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity;\nimport org.springframework.security.access.prepost.PreAuthorize;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PathVariable;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PostMapping;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PutMapping;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestBody;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestParam;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.ResponseStatus;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;\n\n@RestController\n@RequestMapping(\"/api/v1/scheduling/slots\")\npublic class ShowSlotController {\n\n    private final ShowSlotService showSlotService;\n    private final ShowSlotMapper showSlotMapper;\n\n    public ShowSlotController(ShowSlotService showSlotService, ShowSlotMapper showSlotMapper) {\n        this.showSlotService = showSlotService;\n        this.showSlotMapper = showSlotMapper;\n    }\n\n    @PostMapping\n    @ResponseStatus(HttpStatus.CREATED)\n    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.ADMIN + \"')\")\n    public ShowSlotResponse createSlot(\n        @RequestParam(\"orgId\") Long organizationId,\n        @Valid @RequestBody CreateShowSlotRequest request\n    ) {\n        ShowSlot slot = showSlotService.createSlot(organizationId, request);\n        return showSlotMapper.toResponse(slot);\n    }\n\n    @PostMapping(\"/{id}/submit\")\n    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.ADMIN + \"')\")\n    public ShowSlotSubmitResponse submitSlot(\n        @RequestParam(\"orgId\") Long organizationId,\n        @PathVariable(\"id\") Long slotId\n    ) {\n        ShowSlot slot = showSlotService.submitSlot(organizationId, slotId);\n        return new ShowSlotSubmitResponse(slot.getId(), slot.getStatus(), slot.getEbEventId(), slot.getSyncAttemptCount(), \"EB sync initiated\");\n    }\n\n    @GetMapping(\"/{id}\")\n    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.ADMIN + \"')\")\n    public ShowSlotResponse getSlot(@PathVariable(\"id\") Long slotId) {\n        return showSlotMapper.toResponse(showSlotService.getSlot(slotId));\n    }\n\n    @GetMapping\n    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.ADMIN + \"')\")\n    public PageResponse<ShowSlotResponse> listSlots(\n        @RequestParam(\"orgId\") Long organizationId,\n        @RequestParam(name = \"status\", required = false) ShowSlotStatus status,\n        @RequestParam(name = \"venueId\", required = false) Long venueId,\n        @RequestParam(name = \"cityId\", required = false) Long cityId,\n        @RequestParam(name = \"startAfter\", required = false) @DateTimeFormat(iso = DateTimeFormat.ISO.DATE_TIME) ZonedDateTime startAfter,\n        @RequestParam(name = \"page\", defaultValue = \"0\") int page,\n        @RequestParam(name = \"size\", defaultValue = \"20\") int size\n    ) {\n        Page<ShowSlot> slots = showSlotService.listSlots(organizationId, status, venueId, cityId, startAfter, page, size);\n        List<ShowSlotResponse> responses = slots.map(showSlotMapper::toResponse).getContent();\n        return new PageResponse<>(responses, slots.getTotalElements(), page, size);\n    }\n\n    @PutMapping(\"/{id}\")\n    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.ADMIN + \"')\")\n    public ResponseEntity<ShowSlotResponse> updateSlot(\n        @RequestParam(\"orgId\") Long organizationId,\n        @PathVariable(\"id\") Long slotId,\n        @Valid @RequestBody UpdateShowSlotRequest request\n    ) {\n        ShowSlotUpdateResult result = showSlotService.updateSlot(organizationId, slotId, request);\n        ShowSlotResponse response = showSlotMapper.toResponse(result.slot());\n        if (result.ebSyncFailed()) {\n            return ResponseEntity.status(207).body(response);\n        }\n        return ResponseEntity.ok(response);\n    }\n\n    @PostMapping(\"/{id}/cancel\")\n    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.ADMIN + \"')\")\n    public ShowSlotCancelResponse cancelSlot(\n        @RequestParam(\"orgId\") Long organizationId,\n        @PathVariable(\"id\") Long slotId\n    ) {\n        boolean ebCancelled = showSlotService.cancelSlot(organizationId, slotId);\n        ShowSlot slot = showSlotService.getSlot(slotId);\n        return new ShowSlotCancelResponse(slot.getId(), slot.getStatus(), ebCancelled, \"Slot cancelled\");\n    }\n\n    @PostMapping(\"/{id}/retry-sync\")\n    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.ADMIN + \"')\")\n    public ShowSlotRetryResponse retrySync(\n        @RequestParam(\"orgId\") Long organizationId,\n        @PathVariable(\"id\") Long slotId\n    ) {\n        showSlotService.retrySync(organizationId, slotId);\n        return new ShowSlotRetryResponse(ShowSlotStatus.PENDING_SYNC, \"Retry initiated\");\n    }\n\n    @GetMapping(\"/{id}/pricing-tiers\")\n    @PreAuthorize(\"isAuthenticated()\")\n    public List<ShowSlotPricingTierResponse> getPricingTiers(@PathVariable(\"id\") Long slotId) {\n        return showSlotService.getPricingTiers(slotId)\n            .stream()\n            .map(showSlotMapper::toPricingTierResponse)\n            .toList();\n    }\n\n    @GetMapping(\"/{id}/occurrences\")\n    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.ADMIN + \"')\")\n    public ShowSlotOccurrenceListResponse listOccurrences(@PathVariable(\"id\") Long slotId) {\n        List<ShowSlotOccurrence> occurrences = showSlotService.listOccurrences(slotId);\n        List<ShowSlotOccurrenceResponse> responseList = occurrences.stream()\n            .map(showSlotMapper::toOccurrenceResponse)\n            .toList();\n        return new ShowSlotOccurrenceListResponse(slotId, responseList);\n    }\n\n    @GetMapping(\"/mismatches\")\n    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.ADMIN + \"')\")\n    public PageResponse<ShowSlotResponse> listMismatches(\n        @RequestParam(\"orgId\") Long organizationId,\n        @RequestParam(name = \"page\", defaultValue = \"0\") int page,\n        @RequestParam(name = \"size\", defaultValue = \"20\") int size\n    ) {\n        Page<ShowSlot> slots = showSlotService.listMismatches(organizationId, page, size);\n        List<ShowSlotResponse> responses = slots.map(showSlotMapper::toResponse).getContent();\n        return new PageResponse<>(responses, slots.getTotalElements(), page, size);\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}

org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PutMapping;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestBody;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestParam;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.ResponseStatus;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;\n\n@RestController\n@RequestMapping(\"/api/v1/scheduling/slots\")\npublic class ShowSlotController {\n\n    private final ShowSlotService showSlotService;\n    private final ShowSlotMapper showSlotMapper;\n\n    public ShowSlotController(ShowSlotService showSlotService, ShowSlotMapper showSlotMapper) {\n        this.showSlotService = showSlotService;\n        this.showSlotMapper = showSlotMapper;\n    }\n\n    @PostMapping\n    @ResponseStatus(HttpStatus.CREATED)\n    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.ADMIN + \"')\")\n    public ShowSlotResponse createSlot(\n        @RequestParam(\"orgId\") Long organizationId,\n        @Valid @RequestBody CreateShowSlotRequest request\n    ) {\n        ShowSlot slot = showSlotService.createSlot(organizationId, request);\n        return showSlotMapper.toResponse(slot);\n    }\n\n    @PostMapping(\"/{id}/submit\")\n    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.ADMIN + \"')\")\n    public ShowSlotSubmitResponse submitSlot(\n        @RequestParam(\"orgId\") Long organizationId,\n        @PathVariable(\"id\") Long slotId\n    ) {\n        ShowSlot slot = showSlotService.submitSlot(organizationId, slotId);\n        return new ShowSlotSubmitResponse(slot.getId(), slot.getStatus(), slot.getEbEventId(), slot.getSyncAttemptCount(), \"EB sync initiated\");\n    }\n\n    @GetMapping(\"/{id}\")\n    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.ADMIN + \"')\")\n    public ShowSlotResponse getSlot(@PathVariable(\"id\") Long slotId) {\n        return showSlotMapper.toResponse(showSlotService.getSlot(slotId));\n    }\n\n    @GetMapping\n    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.ADMIN + \"')\")\n    public PageResponse<ShowSlotResponse> listSlots(\n        @RequestParam(\"orgId\") Long organizationId,\n        @RequestParam(name = \"status\", required = false) ShowSlotStatus status,\n        @RequestParam(name = \"venueId\", required = false) Long venueId,\n        @RequestParam(name = \"cityId\", required = false) Long cityId,\n        @RequestParam(name = \"startAfter\", required = false) @DateTimeFormat(iso = DateTimeFormat.ISO.DATE_TIME) ZonedDateTime startAfter,\n        @RequestParam(name = \"page\", defaultValue = \"0\") int page,\n        @RequestParam(name = \"size\", defaultValue = \"20\") int size\n    ) {\n        Page<ShowSlot> slots = showSlotService.listSlots(organizationId, status, venueId, cityId, startAfter, page, size);\n        List<ShowSlotResponse> responses = slots.map(showSlotMapper::toResponse).getContent();\n        return new PageResponse<>(responses, slots.getTotalElements(), page, size);\n    }\n\n    @PutMapping(\"/{id}\")\n    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.ADMIN + \"')\")\n    public ResponseEntity<ShowSlotResponse> updateSlot(\n        @RequestParam(\"orgId\") Long organizationId,\n        @PathVariable(\"id\") Long slotId,\n        @Valid @RequestBody UpdateShowSlotRequest request\n    ) {\n        ShowSlotUpdateResult result = showSlotService.updateSlot(organizationId, slotId, request);\n        ShowSlotResponse response = showSlotMapper.toResponse(result.slot());\n        if (result.ebSyncFailed()) {\n            return ResponseEntity.status(207).body(response);\n        }\n        return ResponseEntity.ok(response);\n    }\n\n    @PostMapping(\"/{id}/cancel\")\n    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.ADMIN + \"')\")\n    public ShowSlotCancelResponse cancelSlot(\n        @RequestParam(\"orgId\") Long organizationId,\n        @PathVariable(\"id\") Long slotId\n    ) {\n        boolean ebCancelled = showSlotService.cancelSlot(organizationId, slotId);\n        ShowSlot slot = showSlotService.getSlot(slotId);\n        return new ShowSlotCancelResponse(slot.getId(), slot.getStatus(), ebCancelled, \"Slot cancelled\");\n    }\n\n    @PostMapping(\"/{id}/retry-sync\")\n    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.ADMIN + \"')\")\n    public ShowSlotRetryResponse retrySync(\n        @RequestParam(\"orgId\") Long organizationId,\n        @PathVariable(\"id\") Long slotId\n    ) {\n        showSlotService.retrySync(organizationId, slotId);\n        return new ShowSlotRetryResponse(ShowSlotStatus.PENDING_SYNC, \"Retry initiated\");\n    }\n\n    @GetMapping(\"/{id}/pricing-tiers\")\n    @PreAuthorize(\"isAuthenticated()\")\n    public List<ShowSlotPricingTierResponse> getPricingTiers(@PathVariable(\"id\") Long slotId) {\n        return showSlotService.getPricingTiers(slotId)\n            .stream()\n            .map(showSlotMapper::toPricingTierResponse)\n            .toList();\n    }\n\n    @GetMapping(\"/{id}/occurrences\")\n    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.ADMIN + \"')\")\n    public ShowSlotOccurrenceListResponse listOccurrences(@PathVariable(\"id\") Long slotId) {\n        List<ShowSlotOccurrence> occurrences = showSlotService.listOccurrences(slotId);\n        List<ShowSlotOccurrenceResponse> responseList = occurrences.stream()\n            .map(showSlotMapper::toOccurrenceResponse)\n            .toList();\n        return new ShowSlotOccurrenceListResponse(slotId, responseList);\n    }\n\n    @GetMapping(\"/mismatches\")\n    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.ADMIN + \"')\")\n    public PageResponse<ShowSlotResponse> listMismatches(\n        @RequestParam(\"orgId\") Long organizationId,\n        @RequestParam(name = \"page\", defaultValue = \"0\") int page,\n        @RequestParam(name = \"size\", defaultValue = \"20\") int size\n    ) {\n        Page<ShowSlot> slots = showSlotService.listMismatches(organizationId, page, size);\n        List<ShowSlotResponse> responses = slots.map(showSlotMapper::toResponse).getContent();\n        return new PageResponse<>(responses, slots.getTotalElements(), page, size);\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}
```

**Content:**

{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T20:07:52.998Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "update_plan",
    "arguments": "{\"explanation\":\"Implementing FR6 across schema, domain, services, controllers, and admin orchestration while preserving existing FR5 behavior.\", \"plan\":[{\"step\":\"Assess existing cancellation/payment flow and map required FR6 deltas\", \"status\":\"completed\"},{\"step\":\"Add Flyway migrations + domain/enums/repositories for cancellation policy and event-cancel audit\", \"status\":\"in_progress\"},{\"step\":\"Refactor cancellation services/controllers for quote, item cancel, full cancel policy logic, and event cancellation listener stub\", \"status\":\"pending\"},{\"step\":\"Add admin slot-cancel orchestration endpoint/client\", \"status\":\"pending\"},{\"step\":\"Build compile check and summarize changes plus discovered gaps/bugs\", \"status\":\"pending\"}]}",
    "call_id": "call_6IsIriJgIvJh5pqhoaICzPUY"
  }
}
```

## Entry 183
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T20:08:02.068Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T20:08:02.068Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call_output",
    "call_id": "call_19yvKcioXRrdIFcdZuqTsATx",
    "output": "Chunk ID: a77f11\nWall time: 0.0517 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 338\nOutput:\npackage com.eventplatform.scheduling.service;\n\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.ShowSlot;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.repository.ShowSlotRepository;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.dto.SlotSummaryDto;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.ResourceNotFoundException;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.service.SlotSummaryReader;\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\n\n@Service\npublic class SlotSummaryReaderImpl implements SlotSummaryReader {\n\n    private final ShowSlotRepository showSlotRepository;\n\n    public SlotSummaryReaderImpl(ShowSlotRepository showSlotRepository) {\n        this.showSlotRepository = showSlotRepository;\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\n    public SlotSummaryDto getSlotSummary(Long slotId) {\n        ShowSlot slot = showSlotRepository.findById(slotId)\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new ResourceNotFoundException(\"Slot not found: \" + slotId, \"SLOT_NOT_FOUND\"));\n\n        return new SlotSummaryDto(\n            slot.getId(),\n            slot.getStatus().name(),\n            slot.getEbEventId(),\n            slot.getSeatingMode(),\n            slot.getOrganizationId(),\n            slot.getVenueId(),\n            slot.getCityId(),\n            slot.getSourceSeatMapId()\n        );\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}
```

    "output": "Chunk ID: 612a7d\nWall time: 0.0511 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 265\nOutput:\npackage com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.internal;\n\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.ShowSlot;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.service.ShowSlotService;\nimport java.time.Instant;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PathVariable;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;\n\n@RestController\n@RequestMapping(\"/internal/scheduling/slots\")\npublic class InternalSchedulingController {\n\n    private final ShowSlotService showSlotService;\n\n    public InternalSchedulingController(ShowSlotService showSlotService) {\n        this.showSlotService = showSlotService;\n    }\n\n    @GetMapping(\"/{slotId}/timing\")\n    public SlotTimingResponse getSlotTiming(@PathVariable Long slotId) {\n        ShowSlot slot = showSlotService.getSlot(slotId);\n        return new SlotTimingResponse(slotId, slot.getStartTime().toInstant());\n    }\n\n    public record SlotTimingResponse(Long slotId, Instant startTime) {\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}

## Entry 208
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T20:08:49.234Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T20:08:49.234Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > app/src/main/resources/db/migration/V33__create_cancellation_policy_tables.sql <<'EOF'\\nCREATE TABLE cancellation_policies (\\n    id                  BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,\\n    org_id              BIGINT,\\n    scope               VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL,\\n    created_by_admin_id BIGINT,\\n    created_at          TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),\\n    updated_at          TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()\\n);\\n\\nCREATE INDEX idx_cancellation_policies_org_id ON cancellation_policies(org_id);\\n\\nCREATE UNIQUE INDEX uq_cancellation_policies_org_id\\n    ON cancellation_policies(org_id)\\n    WHERE org_id IS NOT NULL;\\n\\nCREATE UNIQUE INDEX uq_cancellation_policies_default\\n    ON cancellation_policies(scope)\\n    WHERE scope = 'SYSTEM_DEFAULT';\\n\\nCREATE TABLE cancellation_policy_tiers (\\n    id                 BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,\\n    policy_id          BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES cancellation_policies(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\n    hours_before_event INTEGER,\\n    refund_percent     INTEGER NOT NULL,\\n    sort_order         INTEGER NOT NULL,\\n    created_at         TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),\\n    CONSTRAINT chk_refund_percent_range CHECK (refund_percent >= 0 AND refund_percent <= 100),\\n    CONSTRAINT uq_policy_tier_sort UNIQUE (policy_id, sort_order)\\n);\\n\\nCREATE INDEX idx_policy_tiers_policy_id ON cancellation_policy_tiers(policy_id);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_policy_tiers_sort_order ON cancellation_policy_tiers(sort_order);\\n\\nINSERT INTO cancellation_policies (org_id, scope, created_by_admin_id)\\nVALUES (NULL, 'SYSTEM_DEFAULT', NULL);\\n\\nINSERT INTO cancellation_policy_tiers (policy_id, hours_before_event, refund_percent, sort_order)\\nSELECT id, 72, 100, 1 FROM cancellation_policies WHERE scope = 'SYSTEM_DEFAULT';\\n\\nINSERT INTO cancellation_policy_tiers (policy_id, hours_before_event, refund_percent, sort_order)\\nSELECT id, 24, 50, 2 FROM cancellation_policies WHERE scope = 'SYSTEM_DEFAULT';\\n\\nINSERT INTO cancellation_policy_tiers (policy_id, hours_before_event, refund_percent, sort_order)\\nSELECT id, NULL, 0, 3 FROM cancellation_policies WHERE scope = 'SYSTEM_DEFAULT';\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_ZsDAjcaz2Phzq3MMLIJvakcP"
  }
}
```

## Entry 212
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T20:08:53.421Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T20:08:53.421Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > app/src/main/resources/db/migration/V34__extend_booking_refund_cancellation_request_for_fr6.sql <<'EOF'\\nALTER TABLE bookings\\n    ADD COLUMN org_id BIGINT,\\n    ADD COLUMN slot_start_time TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE;\\n\\nCREATE INDEX idx_bookings_org_id ON bookings(org_id);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_bookings_slot_start_time ON bookings(slot_start_time);\\n\\nALTER TABLE refunds\\n    ADD COLUMN cancellation_type VARCHAR(30);\\n\\nALTER TABLE cancellation_requests\\n    ADD COLUMN booking_item_id BIGINT REFERENCES booking_items(id);\\n\\nCREATE UNIQUE INDEX uq_cancellation_requests_item_pending\\n    ON cancellation_requests(booking_item_id)\\n    WHERE booking_item_id IS NOT NULL AND status = 'PENDING';\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_YCpjhOTQ3A9Ca1HUriPpP7As"
  }
}
```

    "call_id": "call_4R5SG4aebWX9TiIDqNQ7b4YS",
    "output": "Chunk ID: 7c9628\nWall time: 0.0512 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 449\nOutput:\npackage com.eventplatform.admin.service.client;\n\nimport java.time.Instant;\n\npublic record SchedulingSlotResponse(\n    Long id,\n    String title,\n    String status,\n    int syncAttemptCount,\n    String lastSyncError,\n    Instant lastAttemptedAt,\n    String ebEventId\n) {\n}\npackage com.eventplatform.admin.service;\n\nimport com.eventplatform.admin.service.client.AdminVenueResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.admin.service.client.CatalogAdminClient;\nimport com.eventplatform.admin.service.client.SchedulingAdminClient;\nimport com.eventplatform.admin.service.client.SchedulingSlotResponse;\nimport java.util.List;\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\n\n@Service\npublic class OrgDashboardService {\n\n    private final SchedulingAdminClient schedulingAdminClient;\n    private final CatalogAdminClient catalogAdminClient;\n\n    public OrgDashboardService(\n        SchedulingAdminClient schedulingAdminClient,\n        CatalogAdminClient catalogAdminClient\n    ) {\n        this.schedulingAdminClient = schedulingAdminClient;\n        this.catalogAdminClient = catalogAdminClient;\n    }\n\n    public SlotFlaggedResponse getFlaggedSlots(Long orgId) {\n        List<SchedulingSlotResponse> pending = schedulingAdminClient.getPendingSyncSlots(orgId).stream()\n            .filter(slot -> slot.syncAttemptCount() > 0)\n            .toList();\n        List<SchedulingSlotResponse> mismatches = schedulingAdminClient.getMismatchSlots(orgId);\n        return new SlotFlaggedResponse(pending, mismatches);\n    }\n\n    public List<AdminVenueResponse> getFlaggedVenues(Long orgId) {\n        return catalogAdminClient.getFlaggedVenues(orgId);\n    }\n\n    public record SlotFlaggedResponse(\n        List<SchedulingSlotResponse> pendingSyncFailed,\n        List<SchedulingSlotResponse> activeWithEbMismatch\n    ) {\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}
