    "name": "apply_patch",
    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: payments-ticketing/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/domain/Booking.java\n@@\n import jakarta.persistence.Column;\n import jakarta.persistence.Entity;\n import jakarta.persistence.EnumType;\n import jakarta.persistence.Enumerated;\n import jakarta.persistence.Table;\n+import java.time.Instant;\n@@\n     @Column(name = \"slot_id\", nullable = false)\n     private Long slotId;\n \n+    @Column(name = \"org_id\")\n+    private Long orgId;\n+\n+    @Column(name = \"slot_start_time\")\n+    private Instant slotStartTime;\n+\n@@\n-    public Booking(String bookingRef, Long cartId, Long userId, Long eventId, Long slotId, Long totalAmount, String currency) {\n+    public Booking(\n+        String bookingRef,\n+        Long cartId,\n+        Long userId,\n+        Long eventId,\n+        Long slotId,\n+        Long orgId,\n+        Instant slotStartTime,\n+        Long totalAmount,\n+        String currency\n+    ) {\n         this.bookingRef = bookingRef;\n         this.cartId = cartId;\n         this.userId = userId;\n         this.eventId = eventId;\n         this.slotId = slotId;\n+        this.orgId = orgId;\n+        this.slotStartTime = slotStartTime;\n         this.totalAmount = totalAmount;\n         this.currency = currency;\n         this.status = BookingStatus.PENDING;\n@@\n     public void cancel() {\n         if (status != BookingStatus.CANCELLATION_PENDING) {\n             throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Booking cannot be cancelled from state \" + status, \"INVALID_BOOKING_STATE\");\n         }\n         this.status = BookingStatus.CANCELLED;\n     }\n+\n+    public void cancelFromConfirmed() {\n+        if (status == BookingStatus.CANCELLED) {\n+            return;\n+        }\n+        if (status != BookingStatus.CONFIRMED && status != BookingStatus.CANCELLATION_PENDING) {\n+            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Booking cannot be cancelled from state \" + status, \"INVALID_BOOKING_STATE\");\n+        }\n+        this.status = BookingStatus.CANCELLED;\n+    }\n+\n+    public void updateTotalAmount(Long totalAmount) {\n+        this.totalAmount = totalAmount;\n+    }\n@@\n     public Long getSlotId() {\n         return slotId;\n     }\n \n+    public Long getOrgId() {\n+        return orgId;\n+    }\n+\n+    public Instant getSlotStartTime() {\n+        return slotStartTime;\n+    }\n+\n@@\n     public String getCurrency() {\n         return currency;\n     }\n }\n*** End Patch\n"

    "status": "completed",

    "name": "apply_patch",
    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: payments-ticketing/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/domain/Refund.java\n@@\n import com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.RefundReason;\n+import com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.RefundCancellationType;\n import com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.RefundStatus;\n@@\n     @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\n     @Column(name = \"status\", nullable = false)\n     private RefundStatus status;\n \n+    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\n+    @Column(name = \"cancellation_type\")\n+    private RefundCancellationType cancellationType;\n+\n@@\n-    public Refund(Long bookingId, String stripeRefundId, Long amount, String currency, RefundReason reason, RefundStatus status) {\n+    public Refund(\n+        Long bookingId,\n+        String stripeRefundId,\n+        Long amount,\n+        String currency,\n+        RefundReason reason,\n+        RefundStatus status,\n+        RefundCancellationType cancellationType\n+    ) {\n         this.bookingId = bookingId;\n         this.stripeRefundId = stripeRefundId;\n         this.amount = amount;\n         this.currency = currency;\n         this.reason = reason;\n         this.status = status;\n+        this.cancellationType = cancellationType;\n     }\n@@\n     public RefundStatus getStatus() {\n         return status;\n     }\n+\n+    public RefundCancellationType getCancellationType() {\n+        return cancellationType;\n+    }\n }\n*** End Patch\n"
  }
}

com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.CancellationPolicyScope;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.domain.BaseEntity;\\nimport jakarta.persistence.CascadeType;\\nimport jakarta.persistence.Column;\\nimport jakarta.persistence.Entity;\\nimport jakarta.persistence.EnumType;\\nimport jakarta.persistence.Enumerated;\\nimport jakarta.persistence.OneToMany;\\nimport jakarta.persistence.OrderBy;\\nimport jakarta.persistence.Table;\\nimport java.util.ArrayList;\\nimport java.util.List;\\n\\n@Entity\\n@Table(name = \\\"cancellation_policies\\\")\\npublic class CancellationPolicy extends BaseEntity {\\n\\n    @Column(name = \\\"org_id\\\")\\n    private Long orgId;\\n\\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\\n    @Column(name = \\\"scope\\\", nullable = false)\\n    private CancellationPolicyScope scope;\\n\\n    @Column(name = \\\"created_by_admin_id\\\")\\n    private Long createdByAdminId;\\n\\n    @OneToMany(mappedBy = \\\"policy\\\", cascade = CascadeType.ALL, orphanRemoval = true)\\n    @OrderBy(\\\"sortOrder ASC\\\")\\n    private List<CancellationPolicyTier> tiers = new ArrayList<>();\\n\\n    protected CancellationPolicy() {\\n    }\\n\\n    public CancellationPolicy(Long orgId, CancellationPolicyScope scope, Long createdByAdminId) {\\n        this.orgId = orgId;\\n        this.scope = scope;\\n        this.createdByAdminId = createdByAdminId;\\n    }\\n\\n    public void replaceTiers(List<CancellationPolicyTier> nextTiers) {\\n        this.tiers.clear();\\n        for (CancellationPolicyTier tier : nextTiers) {\\n            tier.attachPolicy(this);\\n            this.tiers.add(tier);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    public Long getOrgId() {\\n        return orgId;\\n    }\\n\\n    public CancellationPolicyScope getScope() {\\n        return scope;\\n    }\\n\\n    public Long getCreatedByAdminId() {\\n        return createdByAdminId;\\n    }\\n\\n    public List<CancellationPolicyTier> getTiers() {\\n        return List.copyOf(tiers);\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > payments-ticketing/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/domain/CancellationPolicyTier.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain;\\n\\nimport jakarta.persistence.Column;\\nimport jakarta.persistence.Entity;\\nimport jakarta.persistence.FetchType;\\nimport jakarta.persistence.GeneratedValue;\\nimport jakarta.persistence.GenerationType;\\nimport jakarta.persistence.Id;\\nimport jakarta.persistence.JoinColumn;\\nimport jakarta.persistence.ManyToOne;\\nimport jakarta.persistence.Table;\\nimport java.time.Instant;\\n\\n@Entity\\n@Table(name = \\\"cancellation_policy_tiers\\\")\\npublic class CancellationPolicyTier {\\n\\n    @Id\\n    @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.IDENTITY)\\n    private Long id;\\n\\n    @ManyToOne(fetch = FetchType.LAZY)\\n    @JoinColumn(name = \\\"policy_id\\\", nullable = false)\\n    private CancellationPolicy policy;\\n\\n    @Column(name = \\\"hours_before_event\\\")\\n    private Integer hoursBeforeEvent;\\n\\n    @Column(name = \\\"refund_percent\\\", nullable = false)\\n    private Integer refundPercent;\\n\\n    @Column(name = com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.exception.InvalidPolicyTierConfigException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.mapper.CancellationPolicyMapper;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.repository.CancellationPolicyRepository;\\nimport java.time.Duration;\\nimport java.time.Instant;\\nimport java.util.Comparator;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport java.util.Objects;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class CancellationPolicyService {\\n\\n    private final CancellationPolicyRepository cancellationPolicyRepository;\\n    private final CancellationPolicyMapper cancellationPolicyMapper;\\n\\n    public CancellationPolicyService(\\n        CancellationPolicyRepository cancellationPolicyRepository,\\n        CancellationPolicyMapper cancellationPolicyMapper\\n    ) {\\n        this.cancellationPolicyRepository = cancellationPolicyRepository;\\n        this.cancellationPolicyMapper = cancellationPolicyMapper;\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public CancellationPolicyResponse createPolicy(Long adminUserId, CancellationPolicyRequest request) {\\n        validateTiers(request.tiers());\\n        if (request.orgId() != null && cancellationPolicyRepository.existsByOrgId(request.orgId())) {\\n            throw new DuplicateOrgPolicyException(request.orgId());\\n        }\\n\\n        CancellationPolicy policy = new CancellationPolicy(\\n            request.orgId(),\\n            request.orgId() == null ? CancellationPolicyScope.SYSTEM_DEFAULT : CancellationPolicyScope.ORG,\\n            adminUserId\\n        );\\n        policy.replaceTiers(toDomainTiers(request.tiers()));\\n        return cancellationPolicyMapper.toResponse(cancellationPolicyRepository.save(policy));\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public CancellationPolicyResponse updatePolicy(Long policyId, CancellationPolicyRequest request) {\\n        validateTiers(request.tiers());\\n\\n        CancellationPolicy policy = cancellationPolicyRepository.findById(policyId)\\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new CancellationPolicyNotFoundException(\\\"Cancellation policy not found: \\\" + policyId));\\n\\n        if (!Objects.equals(policy.getOrgId(), request.orgId())) {\\n            throw new InvalidPolicyTierConfigException(\\\"orgId cannot be changed for an existing policy\\\");\\n        }\\n\\n        policy.replaceTiers(toDomainTiers(request.tiers()));\\n        return cancellationPolicyMapper.toResponse(policy);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\\n    public CancellationPolicyResponse getPolicy(Long policyId) {\\n        CancellationPolicy policy = cancellationPolicyRepository.findById(policyId)\\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new CancellationPolicyNotFoundException(\\\"Cancellation policy not found: \\\" + policyId));\\n        return cancellationPolicyMapper.toResponse(policy);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\\n    public CancellationPolicyResponse getEffectivePolicy(Long orgId) {\\n        return cancellationPolicyMapper.toResponse(resolveEffectivePolicy(orgId));\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\\n    public RefundCalculationResult calculateRefund(Booking booking, long baseAmountInSmallestUnit) {\\n        int fallbackPercent = 100;\\n        if (booking.getSlotStartTime() == null) {\\n            long fallbackAmount = (baseAmountInSmallestUnit * fallbackPercent) / 100;\\n            return new RefundCalculationResult(fallbackPercent, fallbackAmount, \\\"FALLBACK_100\\\");\\n        }\\n\\n        CancellationPolicy policy = resolveEffectivePolicy(booking.getOrgId());\\n        List<CancellationPolicyTier> tiers = policy.getTiers().stream()\\n            .sorted(Comparator.comparing(CancellationPolicyTier::getSortOrder))\\n            .toList();\\n        if (tiers.isEmpty()) {\\n            long fallbackAmount = (baseAmountInSmallestUnit * fallbackPercent) / 100;\\n            return new RefundCalculationResult(fallbackPercent, fallbackAmount, \\\"FALLBACK_100\\\");\\n        }\\n\\n        long hoursUntilEvent = Duration.between(Instant.now(), booking.getSlotStartTime()).toHours();\\n        CancellationPolicyTier matchedTier = tiers.stream()\\n            .filter(tier -> tier.getHoursBeforeEvent() == null || hoursUntilEvent >= tier.getHoursBeforeEvent())\\n            .findFirst()\\n            .orElse(tiers.getLast());\\n\\n        int refundPercent = matchedTier.getRefundPercent();\\n        long refundAmount = (baseAmountInSmallestUnit * refundPercent) / 100;\\n\\n        String tierLabel = matchedTier.getHoursBeforeEvent() == null\\n            ? \\\"DEFAULT_TIER\\\"\\n            : \\\"GE_\\\" + matchedTier.getHoursBeforeEvent() + \\\"_HOURS\\\";\\n\\n        return new RefundCalculationResult(refundPercent, refundAmount, tierLabel);\\n    }\\n\\n    private CancellationPolicy resolveEffectivePolicy(Long orgId) {\\n        if (orgId != null) {\\n            CancellationPolicy orgPolicy = cancellationPolicyRepository.findByOrgId(orgId).orElse(null);\\n            if (orgPolicy != null) {\\n                return orgPolicy;\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        return cancellationPolicyRepository.findByScope(CancellationPolicyScope.SYSTEM_DEFAULT)\\n            .orElseGet(() -> {\\n                CancellationPolicy fallback = new CancellationPolicy(null, CancellationPolicyScope.SYSTEM_DEFAULT, null);\\n                fallback.replaceTiers(List.of(new CancellationPolicyTier(null, 100, 1)));\\n                return fallback;\\n            });\\n    }\\n\\n    private List<CancellationPolicyTier> toDomainTiers(List<CancellationPolicyRequest.TierRequest> tiers) {\\n        return tiers.stream()\\n            .map(tier -> new CancellationPolicyTier(tier.hoursBeforeEvent(), tier.refundPercent(), tier.sortOrder()))\\n            .toList();\\n    }\\n\\n    private void validateTiers(List<CancellationPolicyRequest.TierRequest> tiers) {\\n        if (tiers == null || tiers.isEmpty()) {\\n            throw new InvalidPolicyTierConfigException(\\\"At least one policy tier is required\\\");\\n        }\\n\\n        List<CancellationPolicyRequest.TierRequest> sorted = tiers.stream()\\n            .sorted(Comparator.comparing(CancellationPolicyRequest.TierRequest::sortOrder))\\n            .toList();\\n\\n        Integer previousSortOrder = null;\\n        boolean seenNullThreshold = false;\\n\\n        for (CancellationPolicyRequest.TierRequest tier : sorted) {\\n            if (tier.refundPercent() < 0 || tier.refundPercent() > 100) {\\n                throw new InvalidPolicyTierConfigException(\\\"refundPercent must be between 0 and 100\\\");\\n            }\\n            if (tier.sortOrder() < 1) {\\n                throw new InvalidPolicyTierConfigException(\\\"sortOrder must be >= 1\\\");\\n            }\\n            if (previousSortOrder != null && previousSortOrder.equals(tier.sortOrder())) {\\n                throw new InvalidPolicyTierConfigException(\\\"sortOrder values must be unique\\\");\\n            }\\n            if (seenNullThreshold) {\\n                throw new InvalidPolicyTierConfigException(\\\"Tier with null hoursBeforeEvent must be the last tier\\\");\\n            }\\n            if (tier.hoursBeforeEvent() == null) {\\n                seenNullThreshold = true;\\n            }\\n            previousSortOrder = tier.sortOrder();\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_cYZyNnjCnctztD1ZucQ2MqbG"
  }
}

## Entry 299
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T20:12:37.913Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T20:12:37.913Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > payments-ticketing/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/event/listener/ShowSlotCancelledListener.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.event.listener;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.service.EventCancellationRefundService;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.ShowSlotCancelledEvent;\\nimport org.springframework.context.event.EventListener;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Component;\\n\\n@Component\\npublic class ShowSlotCancelledListener {\\n\\n    private final EventCancellationRefundService eventCancellationRefundService;\\n\\n    public ShowSlotCancelledListener(EventCancellationRefundService eventCancellationRefundService) {\\n        this.eventCancellationRefundService = eventCancellationRefundService;\\n    }\\n\\n    @EventListener\\n    public void onShowSlotCancelled(ShowSlotCancelledEvent event) {\\n        eventCancellationRefundService.processEventRefunds(event.slotId(), event.orgId());\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_HAYuaUdGAP4vtOTLXFJ8hx8d"
  }
}
```

## Entry 304

**Content:**

{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T20:13:15.167Z",
  "type": "event_msg",
  "payload": {
    "type": "agent_message",
    "message": "I’m replacing `CancellationService` now to support three flows in one place: policy-based full cancel, item-level partial cancel, and reusable event-cancel finalization hooks. I’ll keep existing endpoints compatible while adding new FR6 endpoints.",
    "phase": "commentary"
  }
}
```

## Entry 306
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T20:14:05.728Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T20:14:05.728Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > payments-ticketing/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/service/CancellationService.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.api.dto.response.CancelItemsResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.api.dto.response.CancellationQuoteResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.api.dto.response.CancellationResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.api.dto.response.RefundResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.Booking;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.BookingItem;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.CancellationRequest;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.ETicket;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.Refund;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.BookingItemStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.BookingStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.CancellationRequestStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.RefundCancellationType;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.RefundReason;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.RefundStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.exception.BookingNotFoundException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.exception.CancellationNotAllowedException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.exception.DuplicateItemCancellationException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.exception.InvalidCancelItemsRequestException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.exception.RefundFailedException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.repository.BookingItemRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.repository.BookingRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.repository.CancellationRequestRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.repository.ETicketRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.repository.RefundRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.BookingCancelledEvent;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.stripe.dto.StripeRefundRequest;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.stripe.dto.StripeRefundResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.stripe.exception.StripeIntegrationException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.stripe.service.StripeRefundService;\\nimport java.util.HashMap;\\nimport java.util.LinkedHashSet;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport java.util.Map;\\nimport java.util.Objects;\\nimport java.util.Set;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class CancellationService {\\n\\n    private final BookingRepository bookingRepository;\\n    private final BookingItemRepository bookingItemRepository;\\n    private final ETicketRepository eTicketRepository;\\n    private final RefundRepository refundRepository;\\n    private final CancellationRequestRepository cancellationRequestRepository;\\n    private final StripeRefundService stripeRefundService;\\n    private final AfterCommitEventPublisher afterCommitEventPublisher;\\n    private final CancellationPolicyService cancellationPolicyService;\\n\\n    public CancellationService(\\n        BookingRepository bookingRepository,\\n        BookingItemRepository bookingItemRepository,\\n        ETicketRepository eTicketRepository,\\n        RefundRepository refundRepository,\\n        CancellationRequestRepository cancellationRequestRepository,\\n        StripeRefundService stripeRefundService,\\n        AfterCommitEventPublisher afterCommitEventPublisher,\\n        CancellationPolicyService cancellationPolicyService\\n    ) {\\n        this.bookingRepository = bookingRepository;\\n        this.bookingItemRepository = bookingItemRepository;\\n        this.eTicketRepository = eTicketRepository;\\n        this.refundRepository = refundRepository;\\n        this.cancellationRequestRepository = cancellationRequestRepository;\\n        this.stripeRefundService = stripeRefundService;\\n        this.afterCommitEventPublisher = afterCommitEventPublisher;\\n        this.cancellationPolicyService = cancellationPolicyService;\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\\n    public CancellationQuoteResponse computeQuote(Long userId, String bookingRef, List<Long> requestedBookingItemIds) {\\n        Booking booking = getOwnedBooking(userId, bookingRef);\\n        ensureBookingConfirmed(booking);\\n\\n        List<BookingItem> selectedItems = resolveSelectedActiveItems(booking.getId(), requestedBookingItemIds);\\n        long requestedAmount = selectedItems.stream().mapToLong(BookingItem::getUnitPrice).sum();\\n\\n        RefundCalculationResult quote = cancellationPolicyService.calculateRefund(booking, requestedAmount);\\n        return new CancellationQuoteResponse(\\n            booking.getBookingRef(),\\n            quote.tierLabel(),\\n            quote.refundPercent(),\\n            requestedAmount,\\n            quote.refundAmountInSmallestUnit(),\\n            booking.getCurrency()\\n        );\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public CancelItemsResponse cancelItems(Long userId, String bookingRef, List<Long> requestedBookingItemIds, RefundReason reason) {\\n        Booking booking = getOwnedBooking(userId, bookingRef);\\n        ensureBookingConfirmed(booking);\\n\\n        List<BookingItem> allItems = bookingItemRepository.findByBookingId(booking.getId());\\n        List<BookingItem> activeItems = allItems.stream()\\n            .filter(item -> item.getStatus() == BookingItemStatus.ACTIVE)\\n            .toList();\\n\\n        if (activeItems.isEmpty()) {\\n            throw new CancellationNotAllowedException(\\\"Booking has no active items to cancel\\\");\\n        }\\n\\n        List<BookingItem> selectedItems = resolveSelectedItemsFromActive(activeItems, requestedBookingItemIds);\\n\\n        for (BookingItem item : selectedItems) {\\n            if (cancellationRequestRepository.existsByBookingItemIdAndStatus(item.getId(), CancellationRequestStatus.PENDING)) {\\n                throw new DuplicateItemCancellationException(item.getId());\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        long requestedAmount = selectedItems.stream().mapToLong(BookingItem::getUnitPrice).sum();\\n        RefundCalculationResult calculation = cancellationPolicyService.calculateRefund(booking, requestedAmount);\\n        long refundAmount = calculation.refundAmountInSmallestUnit();\\n\\n        selectedItems.forEach(item -> cancellationRequestRepository.save(new CancellationRequest(\\n            booking.getId(),\\n            item.getId(),\\n            userId,\\n            reason\\n        )));\\n\\n        if (selectedItems.size() == activeItems.size()) {\\n            booking.markCancellationPending();\\n        }\\n\\n        Refund refund;\\n        try {\\n            refund = createRefundRecord(\\n                booking,\\n                reason,\\n                refundAmount,\\n                RefundCancellationType.BUYER_PARTIAL\\n            );\\n        } catch (StripeIntegrationException ex) {\\n            booking.revertCancellationPending();\\n            throw new RefundFailedException(\\\"Unable to process refund at this time. Please contact support.\\\", ex.getMessage());\\n        }\\n\\n        List<Long> cancelledSeatIds = cancelItemsAndVoidTickets(selectedItems);\\n        cancellationRequestRepository.findByBookingIdAndStatus(booking.getId(), CancellationRequestStatus.PENDING).stream()\\n            .filter(request -> request.getBookingItemId() != null)\\n return;\\n        }\\n\\n        Refund refund = refundRepository.findTopByBookingIdOrderByCreatedAtDesc(bookingId).orElse(null);\\n        if (refund == null) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n publishBookingCancelled(booking, seatIds, \\\"BUYER_CANCEL\\\");\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public void handleRefundFailed(String refundId) {\\n        refundRepository.findByStripeRefundId(refundId).ifPresent(refund -> {\\n            refund.updateStatus(RefundStatus.FAILED);\\n            if (refund.getCancellationType() == booking.revertCancellationPending();\\n                }\\n                cancellationRequestRepository.findTopByBookingIdOrderByRequestedAtDesc(refund.getBookingId())\\n                    .ifPresent(CancellationRequest::reject);\\n            }\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    private Booking getOwnedBooking(Long userId, String bookingRef) {\\n        Booking booking = bookingRepository.findByBookingRef(bookingRef)\\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new BookingNotFoundException(bookingRef));\\n        if (!Objects.equals(booking.getUserId(), userId)) {\\n            throw new BookingNotFoundException(bookingRef);\\n        }\\n        return booking;\\n    }\\n\\n    private void ensureBookingConfirmed(Booking booking) {\\n        if (booking.getStatus() != BookingStatus.CONFIRMED) {\\n            throw new CancellationNotAllowedException(\\\"Booking is not in CONFIRMED state\\\", Map.of(\\\"currentStatus\\\", booking.getStatus().name()));\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    private List<BookingItem> resolveSelectedActiveItems(Long bookingId, List<Long> requestedBookingItemIds) {\\n        List<BookingItem> activeItems = bookingItemRepository.findByBookingId(bookingId).stream()\\n            .filter(item -> item.getStatus() == BookingItemStatus.ACTIVE)\\n            .toList();\\n        return resolveSelectedItemsFromActive(activeItems, requestedBookingItemIds);\\n    }\\n\\n    private List<BookingItem> resolveSelectedItemsFromActive(List<BookingItem> activeItems, List<Long> requestedBookingItemIds) {\\n        if (requestedBookingItemIds == null || requestedBookingItemIds.isEmpty()) {\\n            throw new InvalidCancelItemsRequestException(\\\"bookingItemIds must not be empty\\\");\\n        }\\n\\n        Set<Long> dedupedIds = new LinkedHashSet<>(requestedBookingItemIds);\\n        Map<Long, BookingItem> activeById = new HashMap<>();\\n        for (BookingItem item : activeItems) {\\n            activeById.put(item.getId(), item);\\n        }\\n\\n        List<BookingItem> selectedItems = dedupedIds.stream()\\n            .map(activeById::get)\\n            .filter(Objects::nonNull)\\n            .toList();\\n\\n        if (selectedItems.size() != dedupedIds.size()) {\\n            throw new InvalidCancelItemsRequestException(\\\"All bookingItemIds must belong to the booking and be ACTIVE\\\");\\n        }\\n        return selectedItems;\\n    }\\n\\n    private Refund createRefundRecord(\\n        Booking booking,\\n        RefundReason reason,\\n        long refundAmount,\\n        RefundCancellationType cancellationType\\n    ) {\\n        if (refundAmount <= 0) {\\n            return createLocalSucceededRefund(booking, 0L, reason, cancellationType);\\n        }\\n\\n        StripeRefundResponse stripeRefund = stripeRefundService.createRefund(new StripeRefundRequest(\\n            booking.getStripePaymentIntentId(),\\n            refundAmount,\\n            reason.name().toLowerCase(),\\n            \\\"refund-\\\" + booking.getBookingRef()\\n        ));\\n\\n        RefundStatus refundStatus = toRefundStatus(stripeRefund.status());\\n        if (refundStatus == RefundStatus.FAILED) {\\n            throw new RefundFailedException(\\\"Unable to process refund at this time. Please contact support.\\\", stripeRefund.status());\\n        }\\n\\n        return refundRepository.save(new Refund(\\n            booking.getId(),\\n            stripeRefund.refundId(),\\n            refundAmount,\\n            booking.getCurrency(),\\n            reason,\\n            refundStatus,\\n            cancellationType\\n        ));\\n    }\\n\\n    private Refund createLocalSucceededRefund(\\n        Booking booking,\\n        long refundAmount,\\n        RefundReason reason,\\n        RefundCancellationType cancellationType\\n    ) {\\n        return refundRepository.save(new Refund(\\n            booking.getId(),\\n            null,\\n            refundAmount,\\n            booking.getCurrency(),\\n            reason,\\n            RefundStatus.SUCCEEDED,\\n            cancellationType\\n        ));\\n    }\\n\\n    private List<Long> cancelItemsAndVoidTickets(List<BookingItem> items) {\\n        Set<Long> seatIds = new LinkedHashSet<>();\\n        for (BookingItem item : items) {\\n            item.cancel();\\n            if (item.getSeatId() != null) {\\n                seatIds.add(item.getSeatId());\\n            }\\n            eTicketRepository.findByBookingItemId(item.getId()).ifPresent(ETicket::voidTicket);\\n        }\\n        return List.copyOf(seatIds);\\n    }\\n\\n    private void publishBookingCancelled(Booking booking, List<Long> seatIds, String reason) {\\n        afterCommitEventPublisher.publish(new BookingCancelledEvent(\\n            booking.getId(),\\n            booking.getCartId(),\\n            seatIds,\\n            booking.getUserId(),\\n            reason\\n        ));\\n    }\\n\\n    private RefundStatus toRefundStatus(String stripeStatus) {\\n        if (\\\"succeeded\\\".equalsIgnoreCase(stripeStatus)) {\\n            return RefundStatus.SUCCEEDED;\\n        }\\n        if (\\\"failed\\\".equalsIgnoreCase(stripeStatus) || \\\"canceled\\\".equalsIgnoreCase(stripeStatus)) {\\n            return RefundStatus.FAILED;\\n        }\\n        return RefundStatus.PENDING;\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",

BookingStatus.CONFIRMED) {\\n            throw new CancellationNotAllowedException(\\\"Booking is not in CONFIRMED state\\\", Map.of(\\\"currentStatus\\\", booking.getStatus().name()));\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    private List<BookingItem> resolveSelectedActiveItems(Long bookingId, List<Long> requestedBookingItemIds) {\\n        List<BookingItem> activeItems = bookingItemRepository.findByBookingId(bookingId).stream()\\n            .filter(item -> item.getStatus() == BookingItemStatus.ACTIVE)\\n            .toList();\\n        return resolveSelectedItemsFromActive(activeItems, requestedBookingItemIds);\\n    }\\n\\n    private List<BookingItem> resolveSelectedItemsFromActive(List<BookingItem> activeItems, List<Long> requestedBookingItemIds) {\\n        if (requestedBookingItemIds == null || requestedBookingItemIds.isEmpty()) {\\n            throw new InvalidCancelItemsRequestException(\\\"bookingItemIds must not be empty\\\");\\n        }\\n\\n        Set<Long> dedupedIds = new LinkedHashSet<>(requestedBookingItemIds);\\n        Map<Long, BookingItem> activeById = new HashMap<>();\\n        for (BookingItem item : activeItems) {\\n            activeById.put(item.getId(), item);\\n        }\\n\\n        List<BookingItem> selectedItems = dedupedIds.stream()\\n            .map(activeById::get)\\n            .filter(Objects::nonNull)\\n            .toList();\\n\\n        if (selectedItems.size() != dedupedIds.size()) {\\n            throw new InvalidCancelItemsRequestException(\\\"All bookingItemIds must belong to the booking and be ACTIVE\\\");\\n        }\\n        return selectedItems;\\n    }\\n\\n    private Refund createRefundRecord(\\n        Booking booking,\\n        RefundReason reason,\\n        long refundAmount,\\n        RefundCancellationType cancellationType\\n    ) {\\n        if (refundAmount <= 0) {\\n            return createLocalSucceededRefund(booking, 0L, reason, cancellationType);\\n        }\\n\\n        StripeRefundResponse stripeRefund = stripeRefundService.createRefund(new StripeRefundRequest(\\n            booking.getStripePaymentIntentId(),\\n            refundAmount,\\n            reason.name().toLowerCase(),\\n            \\\"refund-\\\" + booking.getBookingRef()\\n        ));\\n\\n        RefundStatus refundStatus = toRefundStatus(stripeRefund.status());\\n        if (refundStatus == RefundStatus.FAILED) {\\n            throw new RefundFailedException(\\\"Unable to process refund at this time. Please contact support.\\\", stripeRefund.status());\\n        }\\n\\n        return refundRepository.save(new Refund(\\n            booking.getId(),\\n            stripeRefund.refundId(),\\n            refundAmount,\\n            booking.getCurrency(),\\n            reason,\\n            refundStatus,\\n            cancellationType\\n        ));\\n    }\\n\\n    private Refund createLocalSucceededRefund(\\n        Booking booking,\\n        long refundAmount,\\n        RefundReason reason,\\n        RefundCancellationType cancellationType\\n    ) {\\n        return refundRepository.save(new Refund(\\n            booking.getId(),\\n            null,\\n            refundAmount,\\n            booking.getCurrency(),\\n            reason,\\n            RefundStatus.SUCCEEDED,\\n            cancellationType\\n        ));\\n    }\\n\\n    private List<Long> cancelItemsAndVoidTickets(List<BookingItem> items) {\\n        Set<Long> seatIds = new LinkedHashSet<>();\\n        for (BookingItem item : items) {\\n            item.cancel();\\n            if (item.getSeatId() != null) {\\n                seatIds.add(item.getSeatId());\\n            }\\n            eTicketRepository.findByBookingItemId(item.getId()).ifPresent(ETicket::voidTicket);\\n        }\\n        return List.copyOf(seatIds);\\n    }\\n\\n    private void publishBookingCancelled(Booking booking, List<Long> seatIds, String reason) {\\n        afterCommitEventPublisher.publish(new BookingCancelledEvent(\\n            booking.getId(),\\n            booking.getCartId(),\\n            seatIds,\\n            booking.getUserId(),\\n            reason\\n        ));\\n    }\\n\\n    private RefundStatus toRefundStatus(String stripeStatus) {\\n        if (\\\"succeeded\\\".equalsIgnoreCase(stripeStatus)) {\\n            return RefundStatus.SUCCEEDED;\\n        }\\n        if (\\\"failed\\\".equalsIgnoreCase(stripeStatus) || \\\"canceled\\\".equalsIgnoreCase(stripeStatus)) {\\n            return RefundStatus.FAILED;\\n        }\\n        return RefundStatus.PENDING;\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_LuqtighIZdpkBcsB0NtF1sjo"
  }
}
```

{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T20:14:19.788Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > payments-ticketing/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/service/EventCancellationRefundService.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.Booking;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.EventCancellationRefundAudit;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.Refund;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.BookingStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.EventCancellationAuditStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.repository.BookingRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.repository.EventCancellationRefundAuditRepository;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.PlatformTransactionManager;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.support.TransactionTemplate;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class EventCancellationRefundService {\\n\\n    private final BookingRepository bookingRepository;\\n    private final EventCancellationRefundAuditRepository eventCancellationRefundAuditRepository;\\n    private final CancellationService cancellationService;\\n    private final TransactionTemplate transactionTemplate;\\n\\n    public EventCancellationRefundService(\\n        BookingRepository bookingRepository,\\n        EventCancellationRefundAuditRepository eventCancellationRefundAuditRepository,\\n        CancellationService cancellationService,\\n        PlatformTransactionManager transactionManager\\n    ) {\\n        this.bookingRepository = bookingRepository;\\n        this.eventCancellationRefundAuditRepository = eventCancellationRefundAuditRepository;\\n        this.cancellationService = cancellationService;\\n        this.transactionTemplate = new TransactionTemplate(transactionManager);\\n    }\\n\\n    public void processEventRefunds(Long slotId, Long orgId) {\\n        List<Booking> confirmedBookings = bookingRepository.findBySlotIdAndStatus(slotId, BookingStatus.CONFIRMED);\\n\\n        for (Booking booking : confirmedBookings) {\\n            ensureAuditRow(slotId, booking.getId());\\n\\n            try {\\n                transactionTemplate.executeWithoutResult(status -> {\\n                    EventCancellationRefundAudit audit = eventCancellationRefundAuditRepository.findBySlotIdAndBookingId(slotId, booking.getId())\\n                        .orElseGet(() -> new EventCancellationRefundAudit(slotId, booking.getId()));\\n                    if (audit.getStatus() == EventCancellationAuditStatus.SUCCEEDED) {\\n                        return;\\n                    }\\n                    audit.markPending();\\n                    eventCancellationRefundAuditRepository.save(audit);\\n\\n                    // FR6 stub seam: no dedicated batch Stripe call yet; reuses cancellation orchestration.\\n                    Refund refund = cancellationService.cancelForEventCancellation(booking.getId());\\n                    audit.markSucceeded(refund.getId());\\n                    eventCancellationRefundAuditRepository.save(audit);\\n                });\\n            } catch (Exception ex) {\\n                transactionTemplate.executeWithoutResult(status -> {\\n                    EventCancellationRefundAudit audit = eventCancellationRefundAuditRepository.findBySlotIdAndBookingId(slotId, booking.getId())\\n                        .orElseGet(() -> new EventCancellationRefundAudit(slotId, booking.getId()));\\n                    audit.markFailed(ex.getMessage());\\n                    eventCancellationRefundAuditRepository.save(audit);\\n                });\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    private void ensureAuditRow(Long slotId, Long bookingId) {\\n        transactionTemplate.executeWithoutResult(status -> {\\n            eventCancellationRefundAuditRepository.findBySlotIdAndBookingId(slotId, bookingId)\\n                .orElseGet(() -> eventCancellationRefundAuditRepository.save(new EventCancellationRefundAudit(slotId, bookingId)));\\n        });\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_uCqrpabAqSn8bozbX5uq9kSD"
  }
}

  }

com.eventplatform.shared.stripe.service.StripeRefundService;\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\n\n@Service\npublic class RefundService {\n\n    private final RefundRepository refundRepository;\n    private final CancellationService cancellationService;\n    private final StripeRefundService stripeRefundService;\n\n    public RefundService(\n        RefundRepository refundRepository,\n        CancellationService cancellationService,\n        StripeRefundService stripeRefundService\n    ) {\n        this.refundRepository = refundRepository;\n        this.cancellationService = cancellationService;\n        this.stripeRefundService = stripeRefundService;\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public void updateRefundStatus(String stripeRefundId) {\n        Refund refund = refundRepository.findByStripeRefundId(stripeRefundId).orElse(null);\n        if (refund == null) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        StripeRefundResponse stripeRefund = stripeRefundService.getRefund(stripeRefundId);\n        RefundStatus nextStatus = toRefundStatus(stripeRefund.status());\n        refund.updateStatus(nextStatus);\n\n        if (nextStatus == RefundStatus.SUCCEEDED) {\n            cancellationService.finaliseAfterRefund(refund.getBookingId());\n        } else if (nextStatus == RefundStatus.FAILED) {\n            cancellationService.handleRefundFailed(stripeRefundId);\n        }\n    }\n\n    private RefundStatus toRefundStatus(String stripeStatus) {\n        if (\"succeeded\".equalsIgnoreCase(stripeStatus)) {\n            return RefundStatus.SUCCEEDED;\n        }\n        if (\"failed\".equalsIgnoreCase(stripeStatus) || \"canceled\".equalsIgnoreCase(stripeStatus)) {\n            return RefundStatus.FAILED;\n        }\n        return RefundStatus.PENDING;\n    }\n}\n"

**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T20:14:50.182Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "custom_tool_call",
    "status": "completed",
    "call_id": "call_MkGxiRRUL4yoBOmDppOMaNxf",
    "name": "apply_patch",
    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: payments-ticketing/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/api/controller/BookingController.java\n@@\n+import com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.api.dto.request.CancelItemsRequest;\n import com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.api.dto.request.CancellationRequest;\n import com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.api.dto.response.BookingResponse;\n import com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.api.dto.response.BookingSummaryResponse;\n+import com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.api.dto.response.CancelItemsResponse;\n+import com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.api.dto.response.CancellationQuoteResponse;\n import com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.api.dto.response.CancellationResponse;\n@@\n import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PathVariable;\n import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PostMapping;\n+import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestParam;\n import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestBody;\n import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;\n import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;\n@@\n     public CancellationResponse cancel(\n         Authentication authentication,\n         @PathVariable String bookingRef,\n         @Valid @RequestBody CancellationRequest request\n@@\n         AuthenticatedUser user = (AuthenticatedUser) authentication.getPrincipal();\n         return cancellationService.cancel(user.userId(), bookingRef, request.reason());\n     }\n+\n+    @GetMapping(\"/{bookingRef}/cancellation-quote\")\n+    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.USER + \"')\")\n+    public CancellationQuoteResponse cancellationQuote(\n+        Authentication authentication,\n+        @PathVariable String bookingRef,\n+        @RequestParam(\"bookingItemIds\") java.util.List<Long> bookingItemIds\n+    ) {\n+        AuthenticatedUser user = (AuthenticatedUser) authentication.getPrincipal();\n+        return cancellationService.computeQuote(user.userId(), bookingRef, bookingItemIds);\n+    }\n+\n+    @PostMapping(\"/{bookingRef}/cancel-items\")\n+    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.USER + \"')\")\n+    public CancelItemsResponse cancelItems(\n+        Authentication authentication,\n+        @PathVariable String bookingRef,\n+        @Valid @RequestBody CancelItemsRequest request\n+    ) {\n+        AuthenticatedUser user = (AuthenticatedUser) authentication.getPrincipal();\n+        return cancellationService.cancelItems(user.userId(), bookingRef, request.bookingItemIds(), request.reason());\n+    }\n }\n*** End Patch\n"
  }
}
```

com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.api.controller;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.api.dto.request.CancellationPolicyRequest;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.api.dto.response.CancellationPolicyResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.service.CancellationPolicyService;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.security.AuthenticatedUser;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.security.Roles;\\nimport jakarta.validation.Valid;\\nimport org.springframework.security.access.prepost.PreAuthorize;\\nimport org.springframework.security.core.Authentication;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PathVariable;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PostMapping;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PutMapping;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestBody;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestParam;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;\\n\\n@RestController\\n@RequestMapping(\\\"/api/v1/admin/cancellation-policies\\\")\\npublic class CancellationPolicyController {\\n\\n    private final CancellationPolicyService cancellationPolicyService;\\n\\n    public CancellationPolicyController(CancellationPolicyService cancellationPolicyService) {\\n        this.cancellationPolicyService = cancellationPolicyService;\\n    }\\n\\n    @PostMapping\\n    @PreAuthorize(\\\"hasRole('\\\" + Roles.ADMIN + \\\"')\\\")\\n    public CancellationPolicyResponse create(\\n        Authentication authentication,\\n        @Valid @RequestBody CancellationPolicyRequest request\\n    ) {\\n        AuthenticatedUser user = (AuthenticatedUser) authentication.getPrincipal();\\n        return cancellationPolicyService.createPolicy(user.userId(), request);\\n    }\\n\\n    @PutMapping(\\\"/{policyId}\\\")\\n    @PreAuthorize(\\\"hasRole('\\\" + Roles.ADMIN + \\\"')\\\")\\n    public CancellationPolicyResponse update(\\n        @PathVariable Long policyId,\\n        @Valid @RequestBody CancellationPolicyRequest request\\n    ) {\\n        return cancellationPolicyService.updatePolicy(policyId, request);\\n    }\\n\\n    @GetMapping(\\\"/{policyId}\\\")\\n    @PreAuthorize(\\\"hasRole('\\\" + Roles.ADMIN + \\\"')\\\")\\n    public CancellationPolicyResponse getById(@PathVariable Long policyId) {\\n        return cancellationPolicyService.getPolicy(policyId);\\n    }\\n\\n    @GetMapping\\n    @PreAuthorize(\\\"hasRole('\\\" + Roles.ADMIN + \\\"')\\\")\\n    public CancellationPolicyResponse getEffective(@RequestParam(\\\"orgId\\\") Long orgId) {\\n        return cancellationPolicyService.getEffectivePolicy(orgId);\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_LkOQJvY69OJnz66soYqUoNwE"
  }
}

{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T20:15:08.784Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "custom_tool_call",
    "status": "completed",
    "call_id": "call_JzvV0TzYejIljMbuxyMbRmtj",
    "name": "apply_patch",
    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: admin/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/admin/service/client/SchedulingAdminClient.java\n@@\n import com.eventplatform.shared.common.dto.PageResponse;\n import com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.IntegrationException;\n import java.util.List;\n@@\n     public List<SchedulingSlotResponse> getMismatchSlots(Long orgId) {\n         try {\n             PageResponse<SchedulingSlotResponse> response = restClient.get()\n@@\n         } catch (RestClientResponseException ex) {\n             throw new IntegrationException(\"Failed to fetch mismatch slots\", \"SCHEDULING_INTEGRATION_ERROR\");\n         }\n     }\n+\n+    public SchedulingSlotCancelResponse cancelSlot(Long orgId, Long slotId) {\n+        try {\n+            return restClient.post()\n+                .uri(uriBuilder -> uriBuilder\n+                    .path(\"/api/v1/scheduling/slots/{slotId}/cancel\")\n+                    .queryParam(\"orgId\", orgId)\n+                    .build(slotId))\n+                .retrieve()\n+                .body(SchedulingSlotCancelResponse.class);\n+        } catch (RestClientResponseException ex) {\n+            throw new IntegrationException(\"Failed to cancel slot\", \"SCHEDULING_INTEGRATION_ERROR\");\n+        }\n+    }\n }\n*** End Patch\n"
  }
}
```

## Entry 348
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T20:15:17.622Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T20:15:17.622Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > admin/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/admin/service/client/SchedulingSlotCancelResponse.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.admin.service.client;\\n\\npublic record SchedulingSlotCancelResponse(\\n    Long slotId,\\n    String status,\\n    Boolean ebCancelled,\\n    String message\\n) {\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > admin/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/admin/api/controller/AdminSlotCancelController.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.admin.api.controller;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.admin.service.client.SchedulingAdminClient;\\nimport com.eventplatform.admin.service.client.SchedulingSlotCancelResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.security.Roles;\\nimport org.springframework.security.access.prepost.PreAuthorize;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PathVariable;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PostMapping;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestParam;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;\\n\\n@RestController\\n@RequestMapping(\\\"/api/v1/admin/slots\\\")\\npublic class AdminSlotCancelController {\\n\\n    private final SchedulingAdminClient schedulingAdminClient;\\n\\n    public AdminSlotCancelController(SchedulingAdminClient schedulingAdminClient) {\\n        this.schedulingAdminClient = schedulingAdminClient;\\n    }\\n\\n    @PostMapping(\\\"/{slotId}/cancel\\\")\\n    @PreAuthorize(\\\"hasRole('\\\" + Roles.ADMIN + \\\"')\\\")\\n    public SchedulingSlotCancelResponse cancelSlot(\\n        @PathVariable Long slotId,\\n        @RequestParam(\\\"orgId\\\") Long orgId\\n    ) {\\n        return schedulingAdminClient.cancelSlot(orgId, slotId);\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_3kj8aIgeACJdpW5rXttqavD7"
  }
}
```

## Entry 393
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T20:16:40.703Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T20:16:40.703Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "custom_tool_call",
    "status": "completed",
    "call_id": "call_SFaV6ow6xRkdMcp6XS0ax288",
    "name": "apply_patch",
    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: payments-ticketing/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/service/CancellationPolicyService.java\n@@\n         Integer previousSortOrder = null;\n+        Integer previousHoursBeforeEvent = null;\n         boolean seenNullThreshold = false;\n \n         for (CancellationPolicyRequest.TierRequest tier : sorted) {\n             if (tier.refundPercent() < 0 || tier.refundPercent() > 100) {\n                 throw new InvalidPolicyTierConfigException(\"refundPercent must be between 0 and 100\");\n@@\n             if (seenNullThreshold) {\n                 throw new InvalidPolicyTierConfigException(\"Tier with null hoursBeforeEvent must be the last tier\");\n             }\n             if (tier.hoursBeforeEvent() == null) {\n                 seenNullThreshold = true;\n+            } else {\n+                if (tier.hoursBeforeEvent() < 0) {\n+                    throw new InvalidPolicyTierConfigException(\"hoursBeforeEvent must be >= 0\");\n+                }\n+                if (previousHoursBeforeEvent != null && tier.hoursBeforeEvent() > previousHoursBeforeEvent) {\n+                    throw new InvalidPolicyTierConfigException(\n+                        \"hoursBeforeEvent must be ordered from larger to smaller thresholds by sortOrder\"\n+                    );\n+                }\n+                previousHoursBeforeEvent = tier.hoursBeforeEvent();\n             }\n             previousSortOrder = tier.sortOrder();\n         }\n     }\n }\n*** End Patch\n"
  }
}
```

calculateRefund(Booking booking, long baseAmountInSmallestUnit) {\n    81\t        int fallbackPercent = 100;\n    82\t        if (booking.getSlotStartTime() == null) {\n    83\t            long fallbackAmount = (baseAmountInSmallestUnit * fallbackPercent) / 100;\n    84\t            return new RefundCalculationResult(fallbackPercent, fallbackAmount, \"FALLBACK_100\");\n    85\t        }\n    86\t\n    87\t        CancellationPolicy policy = resolveEffectivePolicy(booking.getOrgId());\n    88\t        List<CancellationPolicyTier> tiers = policy.getTiers().stream()\n    89\t      long hoursUntilEvent = Duration.between(Instant.now(), booking.getSlotStartTime()).toHours();\n    97\t        CancellationPolicyTier matchedTier = tiers.stream()\n    98\t            .filter(tier -> tier.getHoursBeforeEvent() == null || hoursUntilEvent >= tier.getHoursBeforeEvent())\n    99\t            .findFirst()\n   100\t            .orElse(tiers.getLast());\n   101\t\n   102\t        int refundPercent = matchedTier.getRefundPercent();\n   103\t        long refundAmount = (baseAmountInSmallestUnit * refundPercent) / 100;\n   104\t\n   105\t        String tierLabel = matchedTier.getHoursBeforeEvent() == null\n   106\t            ? \"DEFAULT_TIER\"\n   107\t            : \"GE_\" + matchedTier.getHoursBeforeEvent() + \"_HOURS\";\n   108\t\n   109\t        return new RefundCalculationResult(refundPercent, refundAmount, tierLabel);\n   110\t    }\n   111\t\n   112\t    private CancellationPolicy resolveEffectivePolicy(Long orgId) {\n   113\t        if (orgId != null) {\n   114\t            CancellationPolicy orgPolicy = cancellationPolicyRepository.findByOrgId(orgId).orElse(null);\n   115\t            if (orgPolicy != null) {\n   116\t                return orgPolicy;\n   117\t            }\n   118\t        }\n   119\t\n   120\t        return cancellationPolicyRepository.findByScope(CancellationPolicyScope.SYSTEM_DEFAULT)\n   121\t previousHoursBeforeEvent = null;\n   145\t        boolean seenNullThreshold = false;\n   146\t\n   147\t        for (CancellationPolicyRequest.TierRequest tier : sorted) {\n   148\t            if && tier.hoursBeforeEvent() > previousHoursBeforeEvent) {\n   167\t                    throw new InvalidPolicyTierConfigException(\n   168\t                        \"hoursBeforeEvent must be ordered StripePaymentIntentResponse stripePaymentIntent = stripePaymentService.getPaymentIntent(paymentIntentId);\n   206\t        if (!\"succeeded\".equalsIgnoreCase(stripePaymentIntent.status())) {\n   207\t            throw new PaymentNotConfirmedException(stripePaymentIntent.status());\n   208\t        }\n   209\t\n   210\t        payment.markSuccess(stripePaymentIntent.latestCharge());\n   211\t        booking.confirm(paymentIntentId, stripePaymentIntent.latestCharge());\n   212\t\n   213\t        List<CartItemSnapshotDto> cartItems = cartSnapshotReader.getCartItems(booking.getCartId());\n   214\t        if (cartItems.isEmpty()) {\n   215\t            throw new CartItemsFetchException(\"No cart items found for cart=\" + booking.getCartId());\n   216\t        }\n   217\t\n   218\t        List<Long> seatIds = new ArrayList<>();\n   219\t        for (CartItemSnapshotDto cartItem : cartItems) {\n   220\t            int quantity = cartItem.quantity() == null || cartItem.quantity() < 1 ? 1 : cartItem.quantity();\n"
  }
}
```

6\tCREATE INDEX idx_bookings_slot_start_time ON bookings(slot_start_time);\n     7\t\n     8\tALTER TABLE refunds\n     9\t    ADD COLUMN cancellation_type VARCHAR(30);\n    10\t\n    11\tALTER TABLE ## Entry 432
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T20:17:36.799Z
**Role/Type:** event_msg
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T20:17:36.799Z",
  "type": "event_msg",
  "payload": {
    "type": "agent_message",
    "message": "Implemented FR6 from `POQ/Cancelation/SPEC_6.md` across `payments-ticketing`, `admin`, and DB migrations, following module boundaries and shared ACL rules.\n\n**What I changed**\n- Added FR6 schema migrations:\n  - [V33__create_cancellation_policy_tables.sql](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/app/src/main/resources/db/migration/V33__create_cancellation_policy_tables.sql)\n  - [V34__extend_booking_refund_cancellation_request_for_fr6.sql](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/app/src/main/resources/db/migration/V34__extend_booking_refund_cancellation_request_for_fr6.sql)\n  - [V35__create_event_cancellation_refund_audit.sql](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/app/src/main/resources/db/migration/V35__create_event_cancellation_refund_audit.sql)\n- Added cancellation policy domain/repo/service stack and admin policy APIs:\n  - [CancellationPolicyService.java](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/payments-ticketing/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/service/CancellationPolicyService.java:22)\n  - [CancellationPolicyController.java](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/payments-ticketing/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/api/controller/CancellationPolicyController.java:20)\n- Extended booking cancellation flow to policy-driven full cancellation + new item-level cancellation + quote:\n  - [CancellationService.java](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/payments-ticketing/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/service/CancellationService.java:74)\n  - [BookingController.java](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/payments-ticketing/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/api/controller/BookingController.java:68)\n- Added event-level cancellation consumer and batch audit orchestration (stub seam preserved):\n  - [ShowSlotCancelledListener.java](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/payments-ticketing/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/event/listener/ShowSlotCancelledListener.java:8)\n  - [EventCancellationRefundService.java](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/payments-ticketing/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/service/EventCancellationRefundService.java:15)\n- Added admin orchestration stub endpoint delegating to scheduling cancel API:\n  - [AdminSlotCancelController.java](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/admin/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/admin/api/controller/AdminSlotCancelController.java:13)\n  - [SchedulingAdminClient.java](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/admin/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/admin/service/client/SchedulingAdminClient.java:45)\n- Extended booking model for policy resolution inputs cached at booking creation:\n  - [Booking.java](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/payments-ticketing/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/domain/Booking.java:32)\n  - [PaymentService.java](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/payments-ticketing/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/service/PaymentService.java:109)\n\n**Validation**\n- Production code compiled successfully: `mvn -q -DskipTests compile`\n- No test cases were added (as requested).\n\n**Bugs/Gaps flagged (from existing/previous flow + FR6 seam)**\n1. Event-cancel refunds are still intentionally stubbed (local success path), not real Stripe batch execution yet: [EventCancellationRefundService.java](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/payments-ticketing/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/service/EventCancellationRefundService.java:51).\n2. Partial-cancel webhook reconciliation is limited: item-cancel is finalized immediately, and later `refund.failed` can’t fully roll back item state because refund-to-item linkage table is not present in current schema.\n3. `RefundReason` lacks an organizer/event-cancel specific reason; current event-level flow uses `REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER` as placeholder in persisted refund reason.",
    "phase": "final_answer"
  }
}
```

## Entry 437
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T20:22:57.982Z
**Role/Type:** turn_context
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T20:22:57.982Z",
  "type": "turn_context",
  "payload": {
    "turn_id": "019cba84-98bd-7000-a277-ae7c555eb500",
    "cwd": "/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking",
    "current_date": "2026-03-05",
    "timezone": "Asia/Kolkata",
    "approval_policy": "on-request",
    "sandbox_policy": {
      "type": "workspace-write",
      "network_access": false,
      "exclude_tmpdir_env_var": false,
      "exclude_slash_tmp": false
    },
    "model": "gpt-5.3-codex",
    "personality": "pragmatic",
    "collaboration_mode": {
      "mode": "default",
      "settings": {
        "model": "gpt-5.3-codex",
        "reasoning_effort": "medium",
        "developer_instructions": "# Collaboration Mode: Default\n\nYou are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.\n\nYour active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.\n\n## request_user_input availability\n\nThe `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.\n\nIn Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.\n"
      }
    },
    "effort": "medium",
    "summary": "none",
    "user_instructions": "# AGENTS.md — Reference Index\n\n> Every agent working in this codebase must read the files listed below before producing\n> any output. Each file governs a specific concern. Read the ones that apply to your task.\n\n---\n\n## Reference Files\n\n| File | Governs |\n|---|---|\n| `PRODUCT.md` | The 7 modules, what each one owns, dependency order, inter-module event map, Eventbrite ACL facade names, hard architectural rules, and where new code goes. Read this before touching any module. |\n| `docs/EVENTBRITE_INTEGRATION.md` | Eventbrite integration architecture: ACL facades, all FR flows (planned vs. implemented), critical constraints (no user/order creation, no single-order cancel, no seat locking), workarounds. Read before designing any Eventbrite feature. |\n| `docs/MODULE_STRUCTURE_TEMPLATE.md` | Canonical folder and package layout for every module. The exact location of every layer: `api/controller/`, `api/dto/`, `domain/`, `service/`, `repository/`, `mapper/`, `event/published/`, `event/listener/`, `statemachine/`, `exception/`. Anti-patterns list. Read this before writing any class. |\n| `agents/SPEC_GENERATOR.md` | How to produce a `SPEC.md` for any feature. Eight confirmation-gated stages with module context and Eventbrite constraints built-in. Requirements → Domain Model → Architecture & File Structure → DB Schema → API → Business Logic → Error Handling → Tests. Read this before speccing any feature. |\n| `agents/CODING_AGENT.md` | Spring Boot 3.5.11 / Java 21 coding standards. Domain behaviour, service orchestration, mapper rules, controller rules, event rules, 10 Eventbrite ACL facades, inter-module communication (REST + Spring Events), admin/ special rules, state machine, Spring AI. Read this before writing any production code. |\n| `agents/TEST_AGENT.md` | Test agent responsibilities and best practices. Builds tests from `SPEC_*.md` Stage 8, executes tests, fixes test/code issues caused by behavior mismatches, and writes timestamped logs under `test_result_folder/`. Read this before writing or running tests. |\n| `docs/TESTING_GUIDE.md` | Four-layer test structure: `domain/` (unit), `service/` (Mockito), `api/` (@WebMvcTest), `arch/` (ArchUnit enforcing 10 hard rules + Eventbrite constraints). All rule examples, happy path, negative path, exception patterns. Read before writing any test. |\n| `mock-eventbrite-api/README.md` | **Mock Eventbrite Service:** Python FastAPI in-memory mock of Eventbrite API v3. Used for local development and testing. Exposes all 10 ACL facade endpoints without hitting production Eventbrite. See setup instructions below. |\n\n---\n\n## Module Quick Reference\n\nFull detail for each module is in `PRODUCT.md`. This table is a lookup only.\n\n| Module | Owns | External ACL Facades Used |\n|---|---|---|\n| `discovery-catalog` | Events, Venues, Cities, catalog sync | `EbEventSyncService`, `EbTicketService` |\n| `scheduling` | Show slots, conflict validation | `EbEventSyncService` |\n| `identity` | Users, JWT, profiles, preferences, wallet | — |\n| `booking-inventory` | Seats, SeatMap, Cart, Pricing, Seat Lock State Machine | `EbTicketService` |\n| `payments-ticketing` | Bookings, Payments, E-Tickets, Cancellations, Refunds, Wallet | `StripePaymentService`, `StripeRefundService`, `StripeWebhookHandler` |\n| `promotions` | Coupons, Promotions, Eligibility rules | `EbDiscountSyncService` |\n| `engagement` | Reviews, Moderation, AI Chatbot (`service/chatbot/`), RAG pipeline | `EbEventSyncService`, `EbAttendeeService` |\n| `admin/` | No domain ownership. Orchestration and aggregation only. | — |\n| `shared/` | All external ACL facades, JWT, base classes, common DTOs, configs | — |\n\n---\n\n## Hard Rules — Never Violate\n\nCanonical numbering and wording are owned by `PRODUCT.md` Section 9. These shorthand rules apply to every task without exception.\n\n1. No module imports another module's `@Service`, `@Entity`, or `@Repository`.\n  - Exception: `admin/` MAY import module `@Service` beans for READ operations only; all writes MUST go through the owning module REST API.\n2. No module calls Eventbrite, Stripe, or OpenAI HTTP directly — only through `shared/` ACL facades.\n3. ACL facade names are exactly as listed below — never invent new ones.\n4. Spring Events carry only primitives, IDs, enums, and value objects — never `@Entity` objects.\n5. One `GlobalExceptionHandler` in `shared/common/exception/` — never `@ControllerAdvice` in a module.\n6. All field mapping goes in `mapper/` using MapStruct — never inside a service or controller.\n7. `admin/` owns no `@Entity` and no database table.\n8. `shared/` has no dependency on any module.\n9. `app/` has zero business logic.\n10. Dependency direction is strictly downward — no circular imports between modules.\n\n---\n\n## Eventbrite ACL Facade Names (HARD RULE #3)\nRead the docs/eventbriteapiv3public.apib for detail API Endpoint with schema, Response, Request and errors\n\nAll 10 facades are in `shared/eventbrite/service/`. These are the ONLY things modules call for Eventbrite:\n\n1. **EbEventSyncService** — Create, update, publish, cancel events; pull org event catalog\n2. **EbVenueService** — Create and update venues; list org venues\n3. **EbScheduleService** — Create recurring event schedules and occurrences\n4. **EbTicketService** — Create/update ticket classes; manage inventory; check availability\n5. **EbCapacityService** — Retrieve and update event capacity tiers\n6. **EbOrderService** — Read orders post-checkout (admin/ reporting only — NOT used in FR5/FR6 payment flows; JS SDK widget only creates orders)\n7. **EbAttendeeService** — List attendees; verify attendance for reviews (engagement only — FR8 attendance verification)\n8. **EbDiscountSyncService** — Create, update, delete discount codes\n9. **EbRefundService** — INACTIVE for payments — all refunds go through `StripeRefundService`; original EB refund read-only API has no submission endpoint\n10. **EbWebhookService** — Mock/testing only; not used in production registration flow\n\n**See `docs/EVENTBRITE_INTEGRATION.md` for which module uses which facade and what gaps exist.**\n\n---\n\n## Stripe ACL Facades (payments-ticketing only)\n\nAll 3 facades are in `shared/stripe/service/`. Only `payments-ticketing` calls these:\n\n1. **StripePaymentService** — Create PaymentIntents; confirm and capture payments\n2. **StripeRefundService** — Submit refunds; query refund status\n3. **StripeWebhookHandler** — Verify webhook signatures; parse `payment_intent.succeeded` / `payment_intent.payment_failed` / `charge.refunded` events\n\n**Hard Rule:** Never call `com.stripe.*` SDK classes directly from a module service — always delegate to the facade in `shared/stripe/service/`.\n\n---\n\n## Module Dependency Order (HARD RULE #10)\n\n```\nshared/               <- foundational; no dependencies\n  |\n  v\ndiscovery-catalog    <- depends on shared only\n  |\n  v\nscheduling           <- depends on shared + discovery-catalog (REST reads)\nidentity             <- depends on shared only\n  |\n  v\nbooking-inventory    <- depends on shared + discovery-catalog (REST reads)\n  |\n  v\npayments-ticketing   <- depends on shared + booking-inventory + identity (REST)\n  |\n  v\npromotions           <- depends on shared + booking-inventory + identity (REST)\n  |\n  v\nengagement           <- depends on shared + payments-ticketing + identity (REST)\n  |\n  v\nadmin/               <- thin orchestration; reads from all, writes via REST APIs\n  |\n  v\napp/                 <- entry point only; zero business logic\n```\n\n**Golden Rule:** Module at level N can depend on level N-1 or lower (or `shared/`) only. Never import from sibling or downstream modules.\n\n**See `PRODUCT.md` Section 2 for detailed rationale.**\n\n\n## Skills\nA skill is a set of local instructions to follow that is stored in a `SKILL.md` file. Below is the list of skills that can be used. Each entry includes a name, description, and file path so you can open the source for full instructions when using a specific skill.\n### Available skills\n- find-skills: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like \"how do I do X\", \"find a skill for X\", \"is there a skill that can...\", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill. (file: /home/dell/.agents/skills/find-skills/SKILL.md)\n- skill-creator: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Codex's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations. (file: /home/dell/.codex/skills/.system/skill-creator/SKILL.md)\n- skill-installer: Install Codex skills into $CODEX_HOME/skills from a curated list or a GitHub repo path. Use when a user asks to list installable skills, install a curated skill, or install a skill from another repo (including private repos).         "developer_instructions": "# Collaboration Mode: Default\n\nYou are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.\n\nYour active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.\n\n## request_user_input availability\n\nThe `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.\n\nIn Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.\n"
