bookingId) {\n        Booking booking = bookingRepository.findById(bookingId)\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new BookingNotFoundException(bookingId));\n\n        if (booking.getStatus() == BookingStatus.CANCELLED) {\n            return refundRepository.findTopByBookingIdOrderByCreatedAtDesc(bookingId)\n                .orElseGet(() -> refundRepository.save(new Refund(\n                    bookingId,\n                    null,\n                    0L,\n                    booking.getCurrency(),\n                    RefundReason.REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER,\n                    RefundStatus.SUCCEEDED,\n                    RefundCancellationType.EVENT_CANCELLED\n                )));\n        }\n\n        if (booking.getStatus() == BookingStatus.CONFIRMED) {\n            booking.markCancellationPending();\n        }\n\n        Refund refund = createLocalSucceededRefund(\n            booking,\n            booking.getTotalAmount(),\n            RefundReason.REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER,\n            RefundCancellationType.EVENT_CANCELLED\n        );\n\n        List<BookingItem> activeItems = bookingItemRepository.findByBookingId(bookingId).stream()\n            .filter(item -> item.getStatus() == BookingItemStatus.ACTIVE)\n            .toList();\n        List<Long> seatIds = cancelItemsAndVoidTickets(activeItems);\n\n        booking.cancelFromConfirmed();\n        booking.updateTotalAmount(0L);\n\n        publishBookingCancelled(booking, seatIds, \"EVENT_CANCELLED\");\n        return refund;\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public void finaliseAfterRefund(Long bookingId) {\n        Booking booking = bookingRepository.findById(bookingId)\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new BookingNotFoundException(bookingId));\n\n        if (booking.getStatus() == BookingStatus.CANCELLED) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        Refund refund = refundRepository.findTopByBookingIdOrderByCreatedAtDesc(bookingId).orElse(null);\n        if (refund == null) {\n            return;\n        }\n        refund.updateStatus(RefundStatus.SUCCEEDED);\n\n        if (refund.getCancellationType() == RefundCancellationType.BUYER_FULL || refund.getCancellationType() == RefundCancellationType.EVENT_CANCELLED) {\n            List<BookingItem> activeItems = bookingItemRepository.findByBookingId(bookingId).stream()\n                .filter(item -> item.getStatus() == BookingItemStatus.ACTIVE)\n                .toList();\n            List<Long> seatIds = cancelItemsAndVoidTickets(activeItems);\n            booking.cancelFromConfirmed();\n            booking.updateTotalAmount(0L);\n            cancellationRequestRepository.findTopByBookingIdOrderByRequestedAtDesc(bookingId).ifPresent(CancellationRequest::approve);\n            publishBookingCancelled(booking, seatIds, \"BUYER_CANCEL\");\n        }\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public void handleRefundFailed(String refundId) {\n        refundRepository.findByStripeRefundId(refundId).ifPresent(refund -> {\n            refund.updateStatus(RefundStatus.FAILED);\n            if (refund.getCancellationType() == RefundCancellationType.BUYER_FULL) {\n                Booking booking = bookingRepository.findById(refund.getBookingId()).orElse(null);\n                if (booking != null) {\n                    booking.revertCancellationPending();\n                }\n                cancellationRequestRepository.findTopByBookingIdOrderByRequestedAtDesc(refund.getBookingId())\n                    .ifPresent(CancellationRequest::reject);\n            }\n        });\n    }\n\n    private Booking getOwnedBooking(Long userId, String bookingRef) {\n        Booking booking = bookingRepository.findByBookingRef(bookingRef)\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new BookingNotFoundException(bookingRef));\n        if (!Objects.equals(booking.getUserId(), userId)) {\n            throw new BookingNotFoundException(bookingRef);\n        }\n        return booking;\n    }\n\n    private void ensureBookingConfirmed(Booking booking) {\n        if (booking.getStatus() != BookingStatus.CONFIRMED) {\n            throw new CancellationNotAllowedException(\"Booking is not in CONFIRMED state\", Map.of(\"currentStatus\", booking.getStatus().name()));\n        }\n    }\n\n    private List<BookingItem> resolveSelectedActiveItems(Long bookingId, List<Long> requestedBookingItemIds) {\n        List<BookingItem> activeItems = bookingItemRepository.findByBookingId(bookingId).stream()\n            .filter(item -> item.getStatus() == BookingItemStatus.ACTIVE)\n            .toList();\n        return resolveSelectedItemsFromActive(activeItems, requestedBookingItemIds);\n    }\n\n    private List<BookingItem> resolveSelectedItemsFromActive(List<BookingItem> activeItems, List<Long> requestedBookingItemIds) {\n        if (requestedBookingItemIds == null || requestedBookingItemIds.isEmpty()) {\n            throw new InvalidCancelItemsRequestException(\"bookingItemIds must not be empty\");\n        }\n\n        Set<Long> dedupedIds = new LinkedHashSet<>(requestedBookingItemIds);\n        Map<Long, BookingItem> activeById = new HashMap<>();\n        for (BookingItem item : activeItems) {\n            activeById.put(item.getId(), item);\n        }\n\n        List<BookingItem> selectedItems = dedupedIds.stream()\n            .map(activeById::get)\n            .filter(Objects::nonNull)\n            .toList();\n\n        if (selectedItems.size() != dedupedIds.size()) {\n            throw new InvalidCancelItemsRequestException(\"All bookingItemIds must belong to the booking and be ACTIVE\");\n        }\n        return selectedItems;\n    }\n\n    private Refund createRefundRecord(\n        Booking booking,\n        RefundReason reason,\n        long refundAmount,\n        RefundCancellationType cancellationType\n    ) {\n        if (refundAmount <= 0) {\n            return createLocalSucceededRefund(booking, 0L, reason, cancellationType);\n        }\n\n        StripeRefundResponse stripeRefund = stripeRefundService.createRefund(new StripeRefundRequest(\n            booking.getStripePaymentIntentId(),\n            refundAmount,\n            reason.name().toLowerCase(),\n            \"refund-\" + booking.getBookingRef()\n        ));\n\n        RefundStatus refundStatus = toRefundStatus(stripeRefund.status());\n        if (refundStatus == RefundStatus.FAILED) {\n            throw new RefundFailedException(\"Unable to process refund at this time. Please contact support.\", stripeRefund.status());\n        }\n\n        return refundRepository.save(new Refund(\n            booking.getId(),\n            stripeRefund.refundId(),\n            refundAmount,\n            booking.getCurrency(),\n            reason,\n            refundStatus,\n            cancellationType\n        ));\n    }\n\n    private Refund createLocalSucceededRefund(\n        Booking booking,\n        long refundAmount,\n        RefundReason reason,\n        RefundCancellationType cancellationType\n    ) {\n        return refundRepository.save(new Refund(\n            booking.getId(),\n            null,\n            refundAmount,\n            booking.getCurrency(),\n            reason,\n            RefundStatus.SUCCEEDED,\n            cancellationType\n        ));\n    }\n\n    private List<Long> cancelItemsAndVoidTickets(List<BookingItem> items) {\n        Set<Long> seatIds = new LinkedHashSet<>();\n        for (BookingItem item : items) {\n            item.cancel();\n            if (item.getSeatId() != null) {\n                seatIds.add(item.getSeatId());\n            }\n            eTicketRepository.findByBookingItemId(item.getId()).ifPresent(ETicket::voidTicket);\n        }\n        return List.copyOf(seatIds);\n    }\n\n    private void publishBookingCancelled(Booking booking, List<Long> seatIds, String reason) {\n        afterCommitEventPublisher.publish(new BookingCancelledEvent(\n            booking.getId(),\n            booking.getCartId(),\n            seatIds,\n            booking.getUserId(),\n            reason\n        ));\n"
  }
}

booking.getStripePaymentIntentId(),\n            refundAmount,\n            reason.name().toLowerCase(),\n            \"refund-\" + booking.getBookingRef()\n        ));\n\n        RefundStatus refundStatus = toRefundStatus(stripeRefund.status());\n        if (refundStatus == RefundStatus.FAILED) {\n            throw new RefundFailedException(\"Unable to process refund at this time. Please contact support.\", stripeRefund.status());\n        }\n\n        return refundRepository.save(new Refund(\n            booking.getId(),\n            stripeRefund.refundId(),\n            refundAmount,\n            booking.getCurrency(),\n            reason,\n            refundStatus,\n            cancellationType\n        ));\n    }\n\n    private Refund createLocalSucceededRefund(\n        Booking booking,\n        long refundAmount,\n        RefundReason reason,\n        RefundCancellationType cancellationType\n    ) {\n        return refundRepository.save(new Refund(\n            booking.getId(),\n            null,\n            refundAmount,\n            booking.getCurrency(),\n            reason,\n            RefundStatus.SUCCEEDED,\n            cancellationType\n        ));\n    }\n\n    private List<Long> cancelItemsAndVoidTickets(List<BookingItem> items) {\n        Set<Long> seatIds = new LinkedHashSet<>();\n        for (BookingItem item : items) {\n            item.cancel();\n            if (item.getSeatId() != null) {\n                seatIds.add(item.getSeatId());\n            }\n            eTicketRepository.findByBookingItemId(item.getId()).ifPresent(ETicket::voidTicket);\n        }\n        return List.copyOf(seatIds);\n    }\n\n    private void publishBookingCancelled(Booking booking, List<Long> seatIds, String reason) {\n        afterCommitEventPublisher.publish(new BookingCancelledEvent(\n            booking.getId(),\n            booking.getCartId(),\n            seatIds,\n            booking.getUserId(),\n            reason\n        ));\n"
  }
}
```

org.mockito.ArgumentMatchers.any;\\nimport static org.mockito.Mockito.never;\\nimport static org.mockito.Mockito.verify;\\nimport static org.mockito.Mockito.when;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.api.dto.response.CancelItemsResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.api.dto.response.CancellationResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.Booking;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.BookingItem;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.CancellationRequest;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.ETicket;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.Refund;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.BookingItemStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.BookingStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.CancellationRequestStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.ETicketStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.RefundCancellationType;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.RefundReason;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.RefundStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.exception.DuplicateItemCancellationException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.exception.InvalidCancelItemsRequestException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.exception.RefundFailedException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.repository.BookingItemRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.repository.BookingRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.repository.CancellationRequestRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.repository.ETicketRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.repository.RefundRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.BookingCancelledEvent;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.stripe.dto.StripeRefundResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.stripe.exception.StripeIntegrationException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.stripe.service.StripeRefundService;\\nimport java.time.Instant;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport java.util.Optional;\\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.BeforeEach;\\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;\\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.extension.ExtendWith;\\nimport org.mockito.ArgumentCaptor;\\nimport org.mockito.Mock;\\nimport org.mockito.junit.jupiter.MockitoExtension;\\nimport org.springframework.test.util.ReflectionTestUtils;\\n\\n@ExtendWith(MockitoExtension.class)\\nclass CancellationServiceTest {\\n\\n    @Mock\\n    private BookingRepository bookingRepository;\\n    @Mock\\n    private BookingItemRepository bookingItemRepository;\\n    @Mock\\n    private ETicketRepository eTicketRepository;\\n    @Mock\\n    private RefundRepository refundRepository;\\n    @Mock\\n    private CancellationRequestRepository cancellationRequestRepository;\\n    @Mock\\n    private StripeRefundService stripeRefundService;\\n    @Mock\\n    private AfterCommitEventPublisher afterCommitEventPublisher;\\n    @Mock\\n    private CancellationPolicyService cancellationPolicyService;\\n\\n    private CancellationService cancellationService;\\n\\n    @BeforeEach\\n    void setUp() {\\n        cancellationService = new CancellationService(\\n            bookingRepository,\\n            bookingItemRepository,\\n            eTicketRepository,\\n            refundRepository,\\n            cancellationRequestRepository,\\n            stripeRefundService,\\n            afterCommitEventPublisher,\\n            cancellationPolicyService\\n        );\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_cancel_selected_items_and_keep_booking_confirmed_when_partial_item_cancel_requested() {\\n        // Arrange\\n        Booking booking = confirmedBooking(91L, \\\"BK-20260305-001\\\", 31L, 11L, 200000L);\\n        BookingItem firstItem = bookingItem(101L, 91L, 301L, 100000L);\\n        BookingItem secondItem = bookingItem(102L, 91L, 302L, 100000L);\\n        ETicket firstTicket = ticket(501L, 91L, 101L);\\n\\n        when(bookingRepository.findByBookingRef(\\\"BK-20260305-001\\\")).thenReturn(Optional.of(booking));\\n        when(bookingItemRepository.findByBookingId(91L)).thenReturn(List.of(firstItem, secondItem));\\n        when(cancellationRequestRepository.existsByBookingItemIdAndStatus(101L, CancellationRequestStatus.PENDING)).thenReturn(false);\\n        when(cancellationPolicyService.calculateRefund(booking, 100000L)).thenReturn(new RefundCalculationResult(50, 50000L, \\\"GE_24_HOURS\\\"));\\n        when(stripeRefundService.createRefund(any())).thenReturn(new StripeRefundResponse(\\\"re_1\\\", \\\"succeeded\\\", 50000L, \\\"inr\\\"));\\n        when(refundRepository.save(any(Refund.class))).thenAnswer(invocation -> invocation.getArgument(0));\\n        when(cancellationRequestRepository.findByBookingIdAndStatus(91L, CancellationRequestStatus.PENDING))\\n            .thenReturn(List.of(new CancellationRequest(91L, 101L, 31L, RefundReason.REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER)));\\n        when(eTicketRepository.findByBookingItemId(101L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(firstTicket));\\n        when(eTicketRepository.findByBookingItemId(102L)).thenReturn(Optional.empty());\\n\\n        // Act\\n        CancelItemsResponse response = cancellationService.cancelItems(\\n            31L,\\n            \\\"BK-20260305-001\\\",\\n            List.of(101L),\\n            RefundReason.REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER\\n        );\\n\\n        // Assert\\n        assertThat(response.bookingStatus()).isEqualTo(BookingStatus.CONFIRMED);\\n        assertThat(response.cancelledItemIds()).containsExactly(101L);\\n        assertThat(response.refund().percent()).isEqualTo(50);\\n        assertThat(response.refund().amount()).isEqualTo(50000L);\\n        assertThat(firstItem.getStatus()).isEqualTo(BookingItemStatus.CANCELLED);\\n        assertThat(secondItem.getStatus()).isEqualTo(BookingItemStatus.ACTIVE);\\n        assertThat(firstTicket.getStatus()).isEqualTo(ETicketStatus.VOIDED);\\n        assertThat(booking.getTotalAmount()).isEqualTo(100000L);\\n\\n        ArgumentCaptor<BookingCancelledEvent> eventCaptor = ArgumentCaptor.forClass(BookingCancelledEvent.class);\\n        verify(afterCommitEventPublisher).publish(eventCaptor.capture());\\n        assertThat(eventCaptor.getValue().seatIds()).containsExactly(301L);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_cancel_booking_with_zero_refund_and_skip_stripe_when_policy_returns_zero() {\\n        // Arrange\\n        Booking booking = confirmedBooking(92L, \\\"BK-20260305-002\\\", 31L, 12L, 150000L);\\n        BookingItem firstItem = bookingItem(201L, 92L, 401L, 75000L);\\n        BookingItem secondItem = bookingItem(202L, 92L, 402L, 75000L);\\n        ETicket firstTicket = ticket(601L, 92L, 201L);\\n        ETicket secondTicket = ticket(602L, 92L, 202L);\\n\\n        when(bookingRepository.findByBookingRef(\\\"BK-20260305-002\\\")).thenReturn(Optional.of(booking));\\n        when(bookingItemRepository.findByBookingId(92L)).thenReturn(List.of(firstItem, secondItem));\\n        when(cancellationRequestRepository.existsByBookingItemIdAndStatus(any(), any())).thenReturn(false);\\n        when(cancellationPolicyService.calculateRefund(booking, 150000L)).thenReturn(new RefundCalculationResult(0, 0L, \\\"DEFAULT_TIER\\\"));\\n        when(refundRepository.save(any(Refund.class))).thenAnswer(invocation -> invocation.getArgument(0));\\n        when(cancellationRequestRepository.findByBookingIdAndStatus(92L, CancellationRequestStatus.PENDING))\\n            .thenReturn(List.of(\\n                new CancellationRequest(92L, 201L, 31L, RefundReason.REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER),\\n                new CancellationRequest(92L, 202L, 31L, RefundReason.REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER)\\n            ));\\n        when(eTicketRepository.findByBookingItemId(201L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(firstTicket));\\n        when(eTicketRepository.findByBookingItemId(202L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(secondTicket));\\n\\n should_cancel_full_booking_using_policy_driven_refund_amount() {\\n        // Arrange\\n        Booking booking = confirmedBooking(96L, \\\"BK-20260305-006\\\", 31L, 16L, 150000L);\\n unitPrice, \\\"inr\\\");\\n        ReflectionTestUtils.setField(item, \\\"id\\\", id);\\n        return item;\\n    }\\n\\n    private ETicket ticket(Long id, Long bookingId, Long bookingItemId) {\\n ## Entry 512
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T20:26:11.867Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T20:26:11.867Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > payments-ticketing/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/service/EventCancellationRefundServiceTest.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.service;\\n\\nimport static org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat;\\nimport static org.mockito.ArgumentMatchers.any;\\nimport static org.mockito.Mockito.doNothing;\\nimport static org.mockito.Mockito.verify;\\nimport static org.mockito.Mockito.when;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.Booking;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.EventCancellationRefundAudit;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.Refund;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.BookingStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.EventCancellationAuditStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.RefundCancellationType;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.RefundReason;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.RefundStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.repository.BookingRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.repository.EventCancellationRefundAuditRepository;\\nimport java.time.Instant;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport java.util.Optional;\\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.BeforeEach;\\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;\\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.extension.ExtendWith;\\nimport org.mockito.ArgumentCaptor;\\nimport org.mockito.Mock;\\nimport org.mockito.junit.jupiter.MockitoExtension;\\nimport org.springframework.test.util.ReflectionTestUtils;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.PlatformTransactionManager;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.TransactionDefinition;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.TransactionStatus;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.support.SimpleTransactionStatus;\\n\\n@ExtendWith(MockitoExtension.class)\\nclass EventCancellationRefundServiceTest {\\n\\n    @Mock\\n    private BookingRepository bookingRepository;\\n    @Mock\\n    private EventCancellationRefundAuditRepository eventCancellationRefundAuditRepository;\\n    @Mock\\n    private CancellationService cancellationService;\\n    @Mock\\n    private PlatformTransactionManager transactionManager;\\n\\n    private EventCancellationRefundService eventCancellationRefundService;\\n\\n    @BeforeEach\\n    void setUp() {\\n        TransactionStatus status = new SimpleTransactionStatus();\\n        when(transactionManager.getTransaction(any(TransactionDefinition.class))).thenReturn(status);\\n        doNothing().when(transactionManager).commit(status);\\n        doNothing().when(transactionManager).rollback(status);\\n\\n        eventCancellationRefundService = new EventCancellationRefundService(\\n            bookingRepository,\\n            eventCancellationRefundAuditRepository,\\n            cancellationService,\\n            transactionManager\\n        );\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_continue_processing_remaining_bookings_when_one_booking_refund_fails() {\\n        // Arrange\\n        Booking firstBooking = confirmedBooking(1001L, \\\"BK-1001\\\");\\n        Booking secondBooking = confirmedBooking(1002L, \\\"BK-1002\\\");\\n\\n        when(bookingRepository.findBySlotIdAndStatus(77L, BookingStatus.CONFIRMED))\\n            .thenReturn(List.of(firstBooking, secondBooking));\\n        when(eventCancellationRefundAuditRepository.findBySlotIdAndBookingId(77L, 1001L)).thenReturn(Optional.empty());\\n        when(eventCancellationRefundAuditRepository.findBySlotIdAndBookingId(77L, 1002L)).thenReturn(Optional.empty());\\n        when(eventCancellationRefundAuditRepository.save(any(EventCancellationRefundAudit.class)))\\n            .thenAnswer(invocation -> invocation.getArgument(0));\\n\\n        Refund refund = new Refund(\\n            1001L,\\n            null,\\n            100000L,\\n            \\\"inr\\\",\\n            RefundReason.REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER,\\n            RefundStatus.SUCCEEDED,\\n            RefundCancellationType.EVENT_CANCELLED\\n        );\\n        ReflectionTestUtils.setField(refund, \\\"id\\\", 9001L);\\n\\n        when(cancellationService.cancelForEventCancellation(1001L)).thenReturn(refund);\\n        when(cancellationService.cancelForEventCancellation(1002L)).thenThrow(new RuntimeException(\\\"downstream-failure\\\"));\\n\\n        // Act\\n        eventCancellationRefundService.processEventRefunds(77L, 88L);\\n\\n        // Assert\\n        verify(cancellationService).cancelForEventCancellation(1001L);\\n        verify(cancellationService).cancelForEventCancellation(1002L);\\n\\n        ArgumentCaptor<EventCancellationRefundAudit> captor = ArgumentCaptor.forClass(EventCancellationRefundAudit.class);\\n        verify(eventCancellationRefundAuditRepository, org.mockito.Mockito.atLeast(4)).save(captor.capture());\\n\\n        List<EventCancellationRefundAudit> saved = captor.getAllValues();\\n        assertThat(saved.stream().anyMatch(audit -> audit.getBookingId().equals(1001L) && audit.getStatus() == EventCancellationAuditStatus.SUCCEEDED))\\n            .isTrue();\\n        assertThat(saved.stream().anyMatch(audit -> audit.getBookingId().equals(1002L) && audit.getStatus() == EventCancellationAuditStatus.FAILED))\\n            .isTrue();\\n    }\\n\\n    private Booking confirmedBooking(Long id, String bookingRef) {\\n        Booking booking = new Booking(\\n            bookingRef,\\n            11L,\\n            31L,\\n            44L,\\n            77L,\\n            88L,\\n            Instant.now().plusSeconds(24 * 3600),\\n            100000L,\\n            \\\"inr\\\"\\n        );\\n        ReflectionTestUtils.setField(booking, \\\"id\\\", id);\\n        booking.confirm(\\\"pi_123\\\", \\\"ch_123\\\");\\n        return booking;\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_ar9d3nvieigtRuNLIukxrFiE"
  }
}
```

## Entry 517
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T20:26:37.637Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T20:26:37.637Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > payments-ticketing/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/service/CancellationPolicyServiceTest.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.service;\\n\\nimport static org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat;\\nimport static org.mockito.Mockito.never;\\nimport static org.mockito.Mockito.verify;\\nimport static org.mockito.Mockito.when;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.api.dto.response.CancellationPolicyResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.Booking;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.CancellationPolicy;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.CancellationPolicyTier;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.CancellationPolicyScope;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.mapper.CancellationPolicyMapper;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.repository.CancellationPolicyRepository;\\nimport java.time.Instant;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport java.util.Optional;\\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.BeforeEach;\\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;\\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.extension.ExtendWith;\\nimport org.mockito.Mock;\\nimport org.mockito.junit.jupiter.MockitoExtension;\\n\\n@ExtendWith(MockitoExtension.class)\\nclass CancellationPolicyServiceTest {\\n\\n    @Mock\\n    private CancellationPolicyRepository cancellationPolicyRepository;\\n    @Mock\\n    private CancellationPolicyMapper cancellationPolicyMapper;\\n\\n    private CancellationPolicyService cancellationPolicyService;\\n\\n    @BeforeEach\\n    void setUp() {\\n        cancellationPolicyService = new CancellationPolicyService(cancellationPolicyRepository, cancellationPolicyMapper);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_resolve_org_policy_when_org_specific_policy_exists() {\\n        // Arrange\\n        CancellationPolicy orgPolicy = policy(88L, CancellationPolicyScope.ORG,\\n            List.of(new CancellationPolicyTier(24, 50, 1), new CancellationPolicyTier(null, 0, 2)));\\n\\n        when(cancellationPolicyRepository.findByOrgId(88L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(orgPolicy));\\n\\n        Booking booking = booking(88L, Instant.now().plusSeconds(30 * 3600));\\n\\n        // Act\\n        RefundCalculationResult result = cancellationPolicyService.calculateRefund(booking, 100000L);\\n\\n        // Assert\\n        assertThat(result.refundPercent()).isEqualTo(50);\\n        assertThat(result.refundAmountInSmallestUnit()).isEqualTo(50000L);\\n        verify(cancellationPolicyRepository, never()).findByScope(CancellationPolicyScope.SYSTEM_DEFAULT);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_resolve_system_default_policy_when_org_policy_not_found() {\\n        // Arrange\\n        CancellationPolicy defaultPolicy = policy(null, CancellationPolicyScope.SYSTEM_DEFAULT,\\n            List.of(new CancellationPolicyTier(72, 100, 1), new CancellationPolicyTier(24, 50, 2), new CancellationPolicyTier(null, 0, 3)));\\n\\n        when(cancellationPolicyRepository.findByOrgId(99L)).thenReturn(Optional.empty());\\n        when(cancellationPolicyRepository.findByScope(CancellationPolicyScope.SYSTEM_DEFAULT)).thenReturn(Optional.of(defaultPolicy));\\n\\n        Booking booking = booking(99L, Instant.now().plusSeconds(26 * 3600));\\n\\n        // Act\\n        RefundCalculationResult result = cancellationPolicyService.calculateRefund(booking, 200000L);\\n\\n        // Assert\\n        assertThat(result.refundPercent()).isEqualTo(50);\\n        assertThat(result.refundAmountInSmallestUnit()).isEqualTo(100000L);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_return_hardcoded_full_refund_fallback_when_no_policy_exists() {\\n        // Arrange\\n        when(cancellationPolicyRepository.findByOrgId(101L)).thenReturn(Optional.empty());\\n        when(cancellationPolicyRepository.findByScope(CancellationPolicyScope.SYSTEM_DEFAULT)).thenReturn(Optional.empty());\\n\\n        Booking booking = booking(101L, Instant.now().plusSeconds(4 * 3600));\\n\\n        // Act\\n        RefundCalculationResult result = cancellationPolicyService.calculateRefund(booking, 12345L);\\n\\n        // Assert\\n        assertThat(result.refundPercent()).isEqualTo(100);\\n        assertThat(result.refundAmountInSmallestUnit()).isEqualTo(12345L);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_compute_refund_amount_with_floor_rounding_when_policy_percent_has_fractional_result() {\\n        // Arrange\\n        CancellationPolicy defaultPolicy = policy(null, CancellationPolicyScope.SYSTEM_DEFAULT,\\n            List.of(new CancellationPolicyTier(1, 50, 1), new CancellationPolicyTier(null, 0, 2)));\\n        when(cancellationPolicyRepository.findByOrgId(88L)).thenReturn(Optional.empty());\\n        when(cancellationPolicyRepository.findByScope(CancellationPolicyScope.SYSTEM_DEFAULT)).thenReturn(Optional.of(defaultPolicy));\\n\\n        Booking booking = booking(88L, Instant.now().plusSeconds(2 * 3600));\\n\\n        // Act\\n        RefundCalculationResult result = cancellationPolicyService.calculateRefund(booking, 999L);\\n\\n        // Assert\\n        assertThat(result.refundPercent()).isEqualTo(50);\\n        assertThat(result.refundAmountInSmallestUnit()).isEqualTo(499L);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_return_effective_policy_response_when_fetching_effective_policy() {\\n        // Arrange\\n        CancellationPolicy defaultPolicy = policy(null, CancellationPolicyScope.SYSTEM_DEFAULT,\\n            List.of(new CancellationPolicyTier(24, 50, 1), new CancellationPolicyTier(null, 0, 2)));\\n        CancellationPolicyResponse mapped = new CancellationPolicyResponse(1L, null, CancellationPolicyScope.SYSTEM_DEFAULT, null, List.of());\\n\\n        when(cancellationPolicyRepository.findByOrgId(500L)).thenReturn(Optional.empty());\\n        when(cancellationPolicyRepository.findByScope(CancellationPolicyScope.SYSTEM_DEFAULT)).thenReturn(Optional.of(defaultPolicy));\\n        when(cancellationPolicyMapper.toResponse(defaultPolicy)).thenReturn(mapped);\\n\\n        // Act\\n        CancellationPolicyResponse response = cancellationPolicyService.getEffectivePolicy(500L);\\n\\n        // Assert\\n        assertThat(response.scope()).isEqualTo(CancellationPolicyScope.SYSTEM_DEFAULT);\\n    }\\n\\n    private Booking booking(Long orgId, Instant slotStartTime) {\\n        return new Booking(\\n            \\\"BK-TEST-1\\\",\\n            1L,\\n            2L,\\n            3L,\\n            4L,\\n            orgId,\\n            slotStartTime,\\n            1000L,\\n            \\\"inr\\\"\\n        );\\n    }\\n\\n    private CancellationPolicy policy(Long orgId, CancellationPolicyScope scope, List<CancellationPolicyTier> tiers) {\\n        CancellationPolicy policy = new CancellationPolicy(orgId, scope, 10L);\\n        policy.replaceTiers(tiers);\\n        return policy;\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_wLAhaGXP18vu9j24g6fi8DQp"
  }
}
```

## Entry 524
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T20:26:42.050Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T20:26:42.050Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call_output",
    "call_id": "call_f6iei7fqPiClZPIMY2Mt9jRB",
    "output": "Chunk ID: 8f65c6\nWall time: 0.0517 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 322\nOutput:\npackage com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain;\n\nimport static org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat;\n\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.ETicketStatus;\nimport java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets;\nimport java.util.Base64;\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;\n\nclass ETicketTest {\n\n    @Test\n    void should_encode_qr_code_data_as_booking_ref_colon_item_id() {\n        String raw = \"BK-20260304-001:10\";\n        String encoded = Base64.getEncoder().encodeToString(raw.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8));\n\n        ETicket ticket = new ETicket(1L, 10L, encoded, \"/tickets/BK-20260304-001/10.pdf\");\n\n        assertThat(ticket.getQrCodeData()).isEqualTo(encoded);\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void should_transition_active_to_voided_when_void_ticket_called() {\n        ETicket ticket = new ETicket(1L, 10L, \"qr\", \"/tickets/BK-20260304-001/10.pdf\");\n\n        ticket.voidTicket();\n\n        assertThat(ticket.getStatus()).isEqualTo(ETicketStatus.VOIDED);\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void should_keep_ticket_voided_when_void_ticket_called_multiple_times() {\n        ETicket ticket = new ETicket(1L, 10L, \"qr\", \"/tickets/BK-20260304-001/10.pdf\");\n\n        ticket.voidTicket();\n        ticket.voidTicket();\n\n        assertThat(ticket.getStatus()).isEqualTo(ETicketStatus.VOIDED);\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}
```

com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.api.controller.BookingController;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.api.dto.response.BookingResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.RefundReason;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.RefundStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.exception.BookingNotFoundException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.exception.CancellationNotAllowedException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.exception.DuplicateItemCancellationException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.exception.InvalidCancelItemsRequestException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.service.BookingService;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.service.CancellationService;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.security.AuthenticatedUser;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.security.JwtAuthenticationFilter;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.security.SecurityConfig;\\nimport java.time.Instant;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport java.util.Map;\\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.BeforeEach;\\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;\\nimport org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;\\nimport org.springframework.boot.test.autoconfigure.web.servlet.WebMvcTest;\\nimport org.springframework.boot.test.mock.mockito.MockBean;\\nimport org.springframework.context.annotation.Import;\\nimport org.springframework.data.domain.PageImpl;\\nimport org.springframework.data.domain.PageRequest;\\nimport org.springframework.security.authentication.UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken;\\nimport org.springframework.security.core.authority.SimpleGrantedAuthority;\\nimport org.springframework.test.web.servlet.MockMvc;\\n\\n@WebMvcTest(controllers = BookingController.class)\\n@Import({SecurityConfig.class, GlobalExceptionHandler.class})\\nclass BookingControllerTest {\\n\\n    @Autowired\\n    private MockMvc mockMvc;\\n\\n    @MockBean\\n    private BookingService bookingService;\\n    @MockBean\\n    private CancellationService cancellationService;\\n\\n    @MockBean\\n    private JwtAuthenticationFilter jwtAuthenticationFilter;\\n\\n    @BeforeEach\\n    void setUpFilterPassThrough() throws Exception {\\n        doAnswer(invocation -> {\\n            jakarta.servlet.FilterChain chain = invocation.getArgument(2);\\n            chain.doFilter(invocation.getArgument(0), invocation.getArgument(1));\\n            return null;\\n        }).when(jwtAuthenticationFilter).doFilter(any(), any(), any());\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_return_200_with_paginated_bookings_for_authenticated_user() throws Exception {\\n        when(bookingService.listBookings(any(), any())).thenReturn(new PageImpl<>(\\n            List.of(new BookingSummaryResponse(\\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", 21L, BookingStatus.CONFIRMED, 150000L, \\\"inr\\\", Instant.parse(\\\"2026-03-04T10:00:00Z\\\"))),\\n            PageRequest.of(0, 10),\\n            1\\n        ));\\n\\n        mockMvc.perform(get(\\\"/api/v1/bookings\\\").with(authentication(userAuthentication())))\\n            .andExpect(status().isOk())\\n            .andExpect(jsonPath(\\\"$.content[0].bookingRef\\\").value(\\\"BK-20260304-001\\\"));\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_return_200_with_booking_detail_for_owner() throws Exception {\\n        when(bookingService.getBooking(1L, \\\"BK-20260304-001\\\")).thenReturn(new BookingResponse(\\n            \\\"BK-20260304-001\\\",\\n            BookingStatus.CONFIRMED,\\n            21L,\\n            150000L,\\n            \\\"inr\\\",\\n            \\\"pi_123\\\",\\n            List.of(),\\n            Instant.parse(\\\"2026-03-04T10:00:00Z\\\")\\n        ));\\n\\n        mockMvc.perform(get(\\\"/api/v1/bookings/BK-20260304-001\\\").with(authentication(userAuthentication())))\\n            .andExpect(status().isOk())\\n            .andExpect(jsonPath(\\\"$.bookingRef\\\").value(\\\"BK-20260304-001\\\"));\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_return_200_when_booking_cancel_is_successful() throws Exception {\\n        when(cancellationService.cancel(1L, \\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", RefundReason.REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER))\\n            .thenReturn(new CancellationResponse(\\n                \\\"BK-20260304-001\\\",\\n                BookingStatus.CANCELLED,\\n                new RefundResponse(\\\"re_123\\\", 150000L, \\\"inr\\\", RefundStatus.SUCCEEDED)\\n            ));\\n\\n        mockMvc.perform(post(\\\"/api/v1/bookings/BK-20260304-001/cancel\\\")\\n                .with(authentication(userAuthentication()))\\n                .contentType(\\\"application/json\\\")\\n                .content(\\\"{\\\\\\\"reason\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER\\\\\\\"}\\\"))\\n            .andExpect(status().isOk())\\n            .andExpect(jsonPath(\\\"$.status\\\").value(\\\"CANCELLED\\\"));\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_return_200_with_quote_when_cancellation_quote_requested_for_owned_booking() throws Exception {\\n        when(cancellationService.computeQuote(1L, \\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", List.of(101L, 102L)))\\n            .thenReturn(new CancellationQuoteResponse(\\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", \\\"GE_24_HOURS\\\", 50, 150000L, 75000L, \\\"inr\\\"));\\n\\n        mockMvc.perform(get(\\\"/api/v1/bookings/BK-20260304-001/cancellation-quote\\\")\\n                .with(authentication(userAuthentication()))\\n                .queryParam(\\\"bookingItemIds\\\", \\\"101\\\", \\\"102\\\"))\\n            .andExpect(status().isOk())\\n            .andExpect(jsonPath(\\\"$.refundPercent\\\").value(50))\\n            .andExpect(jsonPath(\\\"$.refundAmount\\\").value(75000));\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_return_404_when_cancellation_quote_requested_for_non_owned_booking() throws Exception {\\n        when(cancellationService.computeQuote(1L, \\\"BK-UNKNOWN\\\", List.of(101L)))\\n            .thenThrow(new BookingNotFoundException(\\\"BK-UNKNOWN\\\"));\\n\\n        mockMvc.perform(get(\\\"/api/v1/bookings/BK-UNKNOWN/cancellation-quote\\\")\\n                .with(authentication(userAuthentication()))\\n                .queryParam(\\\"bookingItemIds\\\", \\\"101\\\"))\\n            .andExpect(status().isNotFound())\\n            .andExpect(jsonPath(\\\"$.errorCode\\\").value(\\\"BOOKING_NOT_FOUND\\\"));\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_return_200_when_cancel_items_is_successful() throws Exception {\\n        when(cancellationService.cancelItems(1L, \\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", List.of(101L, 102L), RefundReason.REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER))\\n            .thenReturn(new CancelItemsResponse(\\n                \\\"BK-20260304-001\\\",\\n                BookingStatus.CONFIRMED,\\n                List.of(101L, 102L),\\n                new CancelItemsResponse.ItemCancellationRefundResponse(\\\"BUYER_PARTIAL\\\", 50, 75000L, \\\"inr\\\", \\\"PENDING\\\")\\n            ));\\n\\n        mockMvc.perform(post(\\\"/api/v1/bookings/BK-20260304-001/cancel-items\\\")\\n                .with(authentication(userAuthentication()))\\n                .contentType(\\\"application/json\\\")\\n                .content(\\\"{\\\\\\\"bookingItemIds\\\\\\\":[101,102],\\\\\\\"reason\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER\\\\\\\"}\\\"))\\n            .andExpect(status().isOk())\\n            .andExpect(jsonPath(\\\"$.bookingStatus\\\").value(\\\"CONFIRMED\\\"))\\n            .andExpect(jsonPath(\\\"$.refund.amount\\\").value(75000));\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_return_400_when_cancel_items_payload_is_invalid() throws Exception {\\n        mockMvc.perform(post(\\\"/api/v1/bookings/BK-20260304-001/cancel-items\\\")\\n                .with(authentication(userAuthentication()))\\n                .contentType(\\\"application/json\\\")\\n }).when(jwtAuthenticationFilter).doFilter(any(), any(), any());\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_create_policy_when_admin_is_authenticated() throws Exception {\\n .with(authentication(adminAuthentication()))\\n                .contentType(\\\"application/json\\\")\\n                .content(\\\"{\\\\\\\"orgId\\\\\\\":88,\\\\\\\"tiers\\\\\\\":[{\\\\\\\"hoursBeforeEvent\\\\\\\":72,\\\\\\\"refundPercent\\\\\\\":100,\\\\\\\"sortOrder\\\\\\\":1},{\\\\\\\"hoursBeforeEvent\\\\\\\":null,\\\\\\\"refundPercent\\\\\\\":0,\\\\\\\"sortOrder\\\\\\\":2}]}\\\"))\\n            .andExpect(status().isOk())\\n            .andExpect(jsonPath(\\\"$.orgId\\\").value(88))\\n            .andExpect(jsonPath(\\\"$.scope\\\").value(\\\"ORG\\\"));\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n .with(authentication(adminAuthentication()))\\n                .contentType(\\\"application/json\\\")\\n                .content(\\\"{\\\\\\\"orgId\\\\\\\":88,\\\\\\\"tiers\\\\\\\":[]}\\\"))\\n            .andExpect(status().isBadRequest())\\n            .andExpect(jsonPath(\\\"$.errorCode\\\").value(\\\"VALIDATION_ERROR\\\"));\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void .with(authentication(userAuthentication()))\\n                .contentType(\\\"application/json\\\")\\n                .content(\\\"{\\\\\\\"orgId\\\\\\\":88,\\\\\\\"tiers\\\\\\\":[{\\\\\\\"hoursBeforeEvent\\\\\\\":72,\\\\\\\"refundPercent\\\\\\\":100,\\\\\\\"sortOrder\\\\\\\":1}]}\\\"))\\n            .andExpect(status().isForbidden());\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_return_404_when_policy_id_not_found() throws Exception {\\n .andExpect(status().isOk())\\n            .andExpect(jsonPath(\\\"$.orgId\\\").value(88));\\n    }\\n\\n    private CancellationPolicyResponse sampleResponse() {\\n        return new {

  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > admin/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/admin/api/AdminSlotCancelControllerTest.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.admin.api;\\n\\nimport static org.mockito.Mockito.when;\\nimport static org.springframework.test.web.servlet.request.MockMvcRequestBuilders.post;\\nimport static org.springframework.test.web.servlet.result.MockMvcResultMatchers.jsonPath;\\nimport static org.springframework.test.web.servlet.result.MockMvcResultMatchers.status;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.admin.api.controller.AdminSlotCancelController;\\nimport com.eventplatform.admin.service.client.SchedulingAdminClient;\\nimport com.eventplatform.admin.service.client.SchedulingSlotCancelResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.security.JwtAuthenticationFilter;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.security.JwtTokenProvider;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.security.SecurityConfig;\\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;\\nimport org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;\\nimport org.springframework.boot.test.autoconfigure.web.servlet.WebMvcTest;\\nimport org.springframework.boot.test.context.TestConfiguration;\\nimport org.springframework.boot.test.mock.mockito.MockBean;\\nimport org.springframework.context.annotation.Bean;\\nimport org.springframework.context.annotation.Import;\\nimport org.springframework.security.test.context.support.WithMockUser;\\nimport org.springframework.test.context.ContextConfiguration;\\nimport org.springframework.test.web.servlet.MockMvc;\\n\\nimport static org.mockito.Mockito.mock;\\n\\n@WebMvcTest(AdminSlotCancelController.class)\\n@ContextConfiguration(classes = com.eventplatform.admin.AdminTestApplication.class)\\n@Import({GlobalExceptionHandler.class, SecurityConfig.class, AdminSlotCancelControllerTest.MockBeans.class})\\nclass AdminSlotCancelControllerTest {\\n\\n    @TestConfiguration\\n    static class MockBeans {\\n        @Bean\\n        JwtTokenProvider jwtTokenProvider() {\\n            return mock(JwtTokenProvider.class);\\n        }\\n\\n        @Bean\\n        JwtAuthenticationFilter jwtAuthenticationFilter(JwtTokenProvider jwtTokenProvider) {\\n            return new JwtAuthenticationFilter(jwtTokenProvider);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    @Autowired\\n    private MockMvc mockMvc;\\n\\n    @MockBean\\n    private SchedulingAdminClient schedulingAdminClient;\\n\\n    @Test\\n    @WithMockUser(roles = \\\"ADMIN\\\")\\n    void should_delegate_slot_cancel_to_scheduling_module_when_admin_requests_cancel() throws Exception {\\n        when(schedulingAdminClient.cancelSlot(88L, 77L))\\n            .thenReturn(new SchedulingSlotCancelResponse(77L, \\\"CANCELLED\\\", true, \\\"Slot cancelled\\\"));\\n\\n        mockMvc.perform(post(\\\"/api/v1/admin/slots/77/cancel\\\").queryParam(\\\"orgId\\\", \\\"88\\\"))\\n            .andExpect(status().isOk())\\n            .andExpect(jsonPath(\\\"$.slotId\\\").value(77))\\n            .andExpect(jsonPath(\\\"$.status\\\").value(\\\"CANCELLED\\\"));\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    @WithMockUser(roles = \\\"USER\\\")\\n    void should_return_403_when_non_admin_requests_slot_cancel() throws Exception {\\n        mockMvc.perform(post(\\\"/api/v1/admin/slots/77/cancel\\\").queryParam(\\\"orgId\\\", \\\"88\\\"))\\n            .andExpect(status().isForbidden());\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_28GSfXlIZN6ZtHF9hIPgTYjx"
  }
}

      when(bookingRepository.findByCartId(11L)).thenReturn(Optional.empty());\n        when(bookingRefGenerator.nextRef()).thenReturn(\"BK-20260304-001\");\n        when(slotSummaryReader.getSlotSummary(21L)).thenReturn(new SlotSummaryDto(21L, \"ACTIVE\", \"ev_1\", SeatingMode.RESERVED, 1L, 2L, 3L, null));\n\n        Booking savedBooking = new Booking(\"BK-20260304-001\", 11L, 31L, 21L, 21L, 150000L, \"inr\");\n        ReflectionTestUtils.setField(savedBooking, \"id\", 91L);\n        when(bookingRepository.save(any(Booking.class))).thenReturn(savedBooking);\n        when(stripePaymentService.createPaymentIntent(any())).thenReturn(new StripePaymentIntentResponse(\"pi_123\", \"secret_123\", \"requires_payment_method\", 150000L, \"inr\", null));\n\n        CheckoutInitResponse response = paymentService.createCheckout(event);\n\n        assertThat(response.paymentIntentId()).isEqualTo(\"pi_123\");\n        assertThat(response.clientSecret()).isEqualTo(\"secret_123\");\n        verify(paymentRepository).save(any(Payment.class));\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void should_return_existing_payment_intent_without_stripe_create_when_checkout_already_exists() {\n        CartAssembledEvent event = new CartAssembledEvent(11L, 21L, 31L, 1L, \"ev_1\", null, 150000L, \"inr\", \"u@test.com\");\n        Booking existingBooking = new Booking(\"BK-20260304-001\", 11L, 31L, 21L, 21L, 150000L, \"inr\");\n        ReflectionTestUtils.setField(existingBooking, \"id\", 91L);\n        Payment existingPayment = new Payment(91L, \"pi_existing\", 150000L, \"inr\");\n\n        when(bookingRepository.findByCartId(11L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(existingBooking));\n        when(paymentRepository.findByBookingId(91L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(existingPayment));\n        when(stripePaymentService.getPaymentIntent(\"pi_existing\"))\n            .thenReturn(new StripePaymentIntentResponse(\"pi_existing\", \"secret_existing\", \"requires_payment_method\", 150000L, \"inr\", null));\n\n        CheckoutInitResponse response = paymentService.createCheckout(event);\n\n        assertThat(response.paymentIntentId()).isEqualTo(\"pi_existing\");\n        verify(stripePaymentService, never()).createPaymentIntent(any());\n        verify(bookingRepository, never()).save(any(Booking.class));\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void should_throw_and_not_save_payment_when_create_checkout_stripe_call_fails() {\n        CartAssembledEvent event = new CartAssembledEvent(11L, 21L, 31L, 1L, \"ev_1\", null, 150000L, \"inr\", when(slotSummaryReader.getSlotSummary(21L)).thenReturn(new SlotSummaryDto(21L, \"ACTIVE\", \"ev_1\", SeatingMode.RESERVED, 1L, 2L, 3L, null));\n\n        Booking booking = new Booking(\"BK-20260304-001\", 11L, 31L, 21L, 21L, 150000L, \"inr\");\n        ReflectionTestUtils.setField(booking, \"id\", 91L);\n        when(bookingRepository.save(any(Booking.class))).thenReturn(booking);\n        when(stripePaymentService.createPaymentIntent(any())).thenThrow(new RuntimeException(\"stripe down\"));\n\n        assertThatThrownBy(() -> paymentService.createCheckout(event)).isInstanceOf(RuntimeException.class);\n\n        verify(paymentRepository, never()).save(any(Payment.class));\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void should_confirm_payment_and_create_items_and_tickets_when_stripe_status_succeeded() {\n        Payment payment = new Payment(91L, \"pi_123\", 150000L, \"inr\");\n        Booking booking = new Booking(\"BK-20260304-001\", 11L, 31L, 44L, 21L, 150000L, \"inr\");\n        ReflectionTestUtils.setField(booking, \"id\", 91L);\n\n        when(paymentRepository.findByStripePaymentIntentId(\"pi_123\")).thenReturn(Optional.of(payment));\n        when(bookingRepository.findById(91L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(booking));\n        when(stripePaymentService.getPaymentIntent(\"pi_123\"))\n            .thenReturn(new StripePaymentIntentResponse(\"pi_123\", \"secret\", \"succeeded\", 150000L, \"inr\", \"ch_123\"));\n\n        CartItemSnapshotDto cartItem = new CartItemSnapshotDto(1L, 101L, null, \"TC-1\", 75000L, \"inr\", 1);\n        when(cartSnapshotReader.getCartItems(11L)).thenReturn(List.of(cartItem));\n\n        BookingItem savedItem = new BookingItem(91L, 101L, null, \"TC-1\", 75000L, \"inr\");\n        ReflectionTestUtils.setField(savedItem, \"id\", 501L);\n        when(bookingItemRepository.save(any(BookingItem.class))).thenReturn(savedItem);\n\n        ETicket savedTicket = new ETicket(91L, 501L, \"encoded-qr\", \"/tickets/BK-20260304-001/501.pdf\");\n        when(eTicketRepository.save(any(ETicket.class))).thenReturn(savedTicket);\n        when(eTicketRepository.findByBookingId(91L)).thenReturn(List.of(savedTicket));\n when(stripePaymentService.getPaymentIntent(\"pi_existing\"))\n            .thenReturn(new StripePaymentIntentResponse(\"pi_existing\", \"secret_existing\", \"requires_payment_method\", 150000L, \"inr\", null));\n\n        CheckoutInitResponse response = paymentService.createCheckout(event);\n\n        assertThat(response.paymentIntentId()).isEqualTo(\"pi_existing\");\n        verify(stripePaymentService, never()).createPaymentIntent(any());\n        verify(bookingRepository, never()).save(any(Booking.class));\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void should_throw_and_not_save_payment_when_create_checkout_stripe_call_fails() {\n        CartAssembledEvent event = new CartAssembledEvent(11L, 21L, 31L, 1L, \"ev_1\", null, 150000L, \"inr\", \"u@test.com\");\n        when(bookingRepository.findByCartId(11L)).thenReturn(Optional.empty());\n        when(bookingRefGenerator.nextRef()).thenReturn(\"BK-20260304-001\");\n        when(slotSummaryReader.getSlotSummary(21L)).thenReturn(new SlotSummaryDto(21L, \"ACTIVE\", \"ev_1\", SeatingMode.RESERVED, 1L, 2L, 3L, null));\n\n        Booking booking = new Booking(\"BK-20260304-001\", 11L, 31L, 21L, 21L, 150000L, \"inr\");\n        ReflectionTestUtils.setField(booking, \"id\", 91L);\n        when(bookingRepository.save(any(Booking.class))).thenReturn(booking);\n        when(stripePaymentService.createPaymentIntent(any())).thenThrow(new RuntimeException(\"stripe down\"));\n\n        assertThatThrownBy(() -> paymentService.createCheckout(event)).isInstanceOf(RuntimeException.class);\n\n        verify(paymentRepository, never()).save(any(Payment.class));\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void should_confirm_payment_and_create_items_and_tickets_when_stripe_status_succeeded() {\n        Payment payment = new Payment(91L, \"pi_123\", 150000L, \"inr\");\n        Booking booking = new Booking(\"BK-20260304-001\", 11L, 31L, 44L, 21L, 150000L, \"inr\");\n        ReflectionTestUtils.setField(booking, \"id\", 91L);\n\n        when(paymentRepository.findByStripePaymentIntentId(\"pi_123\")).thenReturn(Optional.of(payment));\n        when(bookingRepository.findById(91L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(booking));\n        when(stripePaymentService.getPaymentIntent(\"pi_123\"))\n            .thenReturn(new StripePaymentIntentResponse(\"pi_123\", \"secret\", \"succeeded\", 150000L, \"inr\", \"ch_123\"));\n\n        CartItemSnapshotDto cartItem = new CartItemSnapshotDto(1L, 101L, null, \"TC-1\", 75000L, \"inr\", 1);\n        when(cartSnapshotReader.getCartItems(11L)).thenReturn(List.of(cartItem));\n\n        BookingItem savedItem = new BookingItem(91L, 101L, null, \"TC-1\", 75000L, \"inr\");\n        ReflectionTestUtils.setField(savedItem, \"id\", 501L);\n        when(bookingItemRepository.save(any(BookingItem.class))).thenReturn(savedItem);\n\n        ETicket savedTicket = new ETicket(91L, 501L, \"encoded-qr\", \"/tickets/BK-20260304-001/501.pdf\");\n        when(eTicketRepository.save(any(ETicket.class))).thenReturn(savedTicket);\n        when(eTicketRepository.findByBookingId(91L)).thenReturn(List.of(savedTicket));\n        when(bookingItemRepository.findByBookingId(91L)).thenReturn(List.of(savedItem));\n\n        when(bookingMapper.toResponse(booking)).thenReturn(new BookingResponse(\n            booking.getBookingRef(),\n            BookingStatus.CONFIRMED,\n            booking.getSlotId(),\n            booking.getTotalAmount(),\n            booking.getCurrency(),\n            \"pi_123\",\n            List.of(),\n            Instant.parse(\"2026-03-04T10:00:00Z\")\n        ));\n        when(eTicketMapper.toResponse(savedTicket)).thenReturn(new ETicketResponse(\n            null,\n            501L,\n            savedTicket.getQrCodeData(),\n            savedTicket.getPdfUrl(),\n            ETicketStatus.ACTIVE\n        ));\n\n        BookingResponse response = paymentService.confirmPayment(31L, \"pi_123\");\n\n        assertThat(response.status()).isEqualTo(BookingStatus.CONFIRMED);\n        assertThat(response.items()).hasSize(1);\n        assertThat(response.items().get(0).eTicket().ticketCode()).isEqualTo(\"BK-20260304-001:501\");\n\n        ArgumentCaptor<BookingConfirmedEvent> eventCaptor = ArgumentCaptor.forClass(BookingConfirmedEvent.class);\n        verify(afterCommitEventPublisher).publish(eventCaptor.capture());\n        assertThat(eventCaptor.getValue().seatIds()).containsExactly(101L);\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void should_return_existing_booking_when_payment_already_confirmed() {\n        Payment payment = new Payment(91L, \"pi_123\", 150000L, \"inr\");\n        payment.markSuccess(\"ch_123\");\n\n        Booking booking = new Booking(\"BK-20260304-001\", 11L, 31L, 44L, 21L, 150000L, \"inr\");\n        ReflectionTestUtils.setField(booking, \"id\", 91L);\n        booking.confirm(\"pi_123\", \"ch_123\");\n\n        when(paymentRepository.findByStripePaymentIntentId(\"pi_123\")).thenReturn(Optional.of(payment));\n        when(bookingRepository.findById(91L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(booking));\n        when(eTicketRepository.findByBookingId(91L)).thenReturn(List.of());\n        when(bookingItemRepository.findByBookingId(91L)).thenReturn(List.of());\n        when(bookingMapper.toResponse(booking)).thenReturn(new BookingResponse(\n            booking.getBookingRef(),\n            booking.getStatus(),\n            booking.getSlotId(),\n            booking.getTotalAmount(),\n            booking.getCurrency(),\n            booking.getStripePaymentIntentId(),\n"
  }
}

Booking(\"BK-20260304-001\", 11L, 31L, 44L, 21L, 150000L, \"inr\");\n        ReflectionTestUtils.setField(booking, \"id\", 91L);\n\n        when(paymentRepository.findByStripePaymentIntentId(\"pi_123\")).thenReturn(Optional.of(payment));\n        when(bookingRepository.findById(91L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(booking));\n        when(stripePaymentService.getPaymentIntent(\"pi_123\"))\n            .thenReturn(new StripePaymentIntentResponse(\"pi_123\", \"secret\", \"requires_action\", 150000L, \"inr\", null));\n\n        assertThatThrownBy(() -> paymentService.confirmPayment(31L, \"pi_123\"))\n            .isInstanceOf(PaymentNotConfirmedException.class);\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void should_throw_and_leave_pending_state_when_confirm_payment_stripe_retrieve_times_out() {\n        Payment payment = new Payment(91L, \"pi_123\", 150000L, \"inr\");\n        Booking booking = new Booking(\"BK-20260304-001\", 11L, 31L, 44L, 21L, 150000L, \"inr\");\n        ReflectionTestUtils.setField(booking, \"id\", 91L);\n\n        when(paymentRepository.findByStripePaymentIntentId(\"pi_123\")).thenReturn(Optional.of(payment));\n        when(bookingRepository.findById(91L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(booking));\n        when(stripePaymentService.getPaymentIntent(\"pi_123\")).thenThrow(new RuntimeException(\"timeout\"));\n\n        assertThatThrownBy(() -> paymentService.confirmPayment(31L, \"pi_123\"))\n            .isInstanceOf(RuntimeException.class)\n            .hasMessageContaining(\"timeout\");\n\n        assertThat(payment.getStatus()).isEqualTo(PaymentStatus.PENDING);\n        assertThat(booking.getStatus()).isEqualTo(BookingStatus.PENDING);\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void should_throw_and_not_publish_event_when_cart_items_fetch_returns_empty() {\n        Payment payment = new Payment(91L, \"pi_123\", 150000L, \"inr\");\n        Booking booking = new Booking(\"BK-20260304-001\", 11L, 31L, 44L, 21L, 150000L, \"inr\");\n        ReflectionTestUtils.setField(booking, \"id\", 91L);\n\n        when(paymentRepository.findByStripePaymentIntentId(\"pi_123\")).thenReturn(Optional.of(payment));\n        when(bookingRepository.findById(91L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(booking));\n        when(stripePaymentService.getPaymentIntent(\"pi_123\"))\n            .thenReturn(new StripePaymentIntentResponse(\"pi_123\", \"secret\", \"succeeded\", 150000L, \"inr\", \"ch_123\"));\n        when(cartSnapshotReader.getCartItems(11L)).thenReturn(List.of());\n\n        assertThatThrownBy(() -> paymentService.confirmPayment(31L, \"pi_123\"))\n            .isInstanceOf(CartItemsFetchException.class);\n\n        verify(bookingItemRepository, never()).save(any(BookingItem.class));\n        verify(eTicketRepository, never()).save(any(ETicket.class));\n        verify(afterCommitEventPublisher, never()).publish(any());\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void should_set_payment_failed_and_booking_cancelled_and_publish_event_when_handle_failure_called() {\n        Payment payment = new Payment(91L, \"pi_123\", 150000L, \"inr\");\n        Booking booking = new Booking(\"BK-20260304-001\", 11L, 31L, 44L, 21L, 150000L, \"inr\");\n        ReflectionTestUtils.setField(booking, \"id\", 91L);\n        BookingItem seatItem = new BookingItem(91L, 101L, null, \"TC-1\", 75000L, \"inr\");\n        BookingItem gaItem = new BookingItem(91L, null, 201L, \"TC-2\", 75000L, \"inr\");\n\n        when(paymentRepository.findByStripePaymentIntentId(\"pi_123\")).thenReturn(Optional.of(payment));\n        when(bookingRepository.findById(91L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(booking));\n        when(bookingItemRepository.findByBookingId(91L)).thenReturn(List.of(seatItem, gaItem));\n\n        paymentService.handleFailure(\"pi_123\", \"card_declined\", \"declined\");\n\n        assertThat(payment.getStatus()).isEqualTo(PaymentStatus.FAILED);\n        assertThat(payment.getFailureCode()).isEqualTo(\"card_declined\");\n        assertThat(booking.getStatus()).isEqualTo(BookingStatus.CANCELLED);\n\n        ArgumentCaptor<PaymentFailedEvent> eventCaptor = ArgumentCaptor.forClass(PaymentFailedEvent.class);\n        verify(afterCommitEventPublisher).publish(eventCaptor.capture());\n        assertThat(eventCaptor.getValue().seatIds()).containsExactly(101L);\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void should_do_nothing_when_handle_failure_called_for_already_failed_payment() {\n        Payment payment = new Payment(91L, \"pi_123\", 150000L, \"inr\");\n        payment.markFailed(\"declined\", \"failed\");\n        when(paymentRepository.findByStripePaymentIntentId(\"pi_123\")).thenReturn(Optional.of(payment));\n\n        paymentService.handleFailure(\"pi_123\", \"declined\", \"failed\");\n\n        verify(bookingRepository, never()).findById(any());\n        verify(afterCommitEventPublisher, never()).publish(any());\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}

100000L);\n    89\t        ETicket firstTicket = ticket(501L, 91L, 101L);\n    90\t\n    91\t        when(bookingRepository.findByBookingRef(\"BK-20260305-001\")).thenReturn(Optional.of(booking));\n    92\t        when(bookingItemRepository.findByBookingId(91L)).thenReturn(List.of(firstItem, secondItem));\n    93\t        when(cancellationRequestRepository.existsByBookingItemIdAndStatus(101L, CancellationRequestStatus.PENDING)).thenReturn(false);\n    94\t        when(cancellationPolicyService.calculateRefund(booking, 100000L)).thenReturn(new RefundCalculationResult(50, 50000L, \"GE_24_HOURS\"));\n    95\t        when(stripeRefundService.createRefund(any())).thenReturn(new StripeRefundResponse(\"re_1\", \"succeeded\", 50000L, \"inr\"));\n    96\t        when(refundRepository.save(any(Refund.class))).thenAnswer(invocation -> invocation.getArgument(0));\n    97\t        when(cancellationRequestRepository.findByBookingIdAndStatus(91L, CancellationRequestStatus.PENDING))\n    98\t            .thenReturn(List.of(new CancellationRequest(91L, 101L, 31L, RefundReason.REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER)));\n    99\t        when(eTicketRepository.findByBookingItemId(101L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(firstTicket));\n   100\t        when(eTicketRepository.findByBookingItemId(102L)).thenReturn(Optional.empty());\n   101\t\n   102\t        // Act\n   103\t        CancelItemsResponse response = cancellationService.cancelItems(\n   104\t            31L,\n   105\t            \"BK-20260305-001\",\n   106\t            List.of(101L),\n   107\t            RefundReason.REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER\n   108\t        );\n   109\t\n   110\t        // Assert\n   111\t        assertThat(response.bookingStatus()).isEqualTo(BookingStatus.CONFIRMED);\n   112\t        assertThat(response.cancelledItemIds()).containsExactly(101L);\n   113\t        assertThat(response.refund().percent()).isEqualTo(50);\n   114\t        assertThat(response.refund().amount()).isEqualTo(50000L);\n   115\t        assertThat(firstItem.getStatus()).isEqualTo(BookingItemStatus.CANCELLED);\n   116\t        assertThat(secondItem.getStatus()).isEqualTo(BookingItemStatus.ACTIVE);\n   117\t        assertThat(firstTicket.getStatus()).isEqualTo(ETicketStatus.VOIDED);\n   118\t        assertThat(booking.getTotalAmount()).isEqualTo(100000L);\n   119\t\n   120\t        ArgumentCaptor<BookingCancelledEvent> eventCaptor = ArgumentCaptor.forClass(BookingCancelledEvent.class);\n"
  }

}

## Entry 692
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T20:36:17.176Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T20:36:17.176Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > test_result_folder/fr6_cancellation_20260305_020556.md <<'EOF'\\n# Test Result — FR6 Cancellation Policy + Item/Event Cancellation\\n\\n- Timestamp: 2026-03-05 02:05:56 IST\\n- Spec: POQ/Cancelation/SPEC_6.md\\n- Module(s): payments-ticketing, admin\\n- Commit/Working State: 49a83d7 (local working tree with uncommitted changes)\\n\\n## Coverage of Stage 8 Cases\\n- Total planned: 14\\n- Implemented: 14\\n- Passed: 14\\n- Failed: 0\\n- Skipped: 0\\n\\n## Failures Found\\n1. `CancellationServiceTest.should_cancel_selected_items_and_keep_booking_confirmed_when_partial_item_cancel_requested`\\n   - Error: `UnnecessaryStubbingException`\\n   - Root cause: Stub for `eTicketRepository.findByBookingItemId(102L)` was never used in partial-cancel path.\\n   - Fix applied: Removed unused stub.\\n\\n2. `payments-ticketing` test compilation (`PaymentServiceTest`)\\n   - Error: `PaymentService` constructor signature mismatch after FR6 changes.\\n   - Root cause: FR6 added `internalBaseUrl` constructor arg and slot timing read in checkout flow.\\n   - Fix applied: Updated test setup to pass base URL and added local HTTP stub server for `/internal/scheduling/slots/21/timing`.\\n\\n3. `admin` web slice tests context load failures\\n   - Error: Missing beans for controllers not under direct test (`SchedulingAdminClient`, `OrgOAuthService`, `OrgDashboardService`).\\n   - Root cause: `@WebMvcTest` + shared test app context instantiated multiple admin controllers.\\n   - Fix applied: Added required `@MockBean` dependencies in `AdminSlotCancelControllerTest` and `OrgEventbriteControllerTest`.\\n\\n## Code/Test Changes Applied\\n- `payments-ticketing/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/service/CancellationPolicyServiceTest.java` — added FR6 policy resolution + fallback + floor rounding tests.\\n- `payments-ticketing/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/service/CancellationServiceTest.java` — replaced old FR5-style tests with FR6 item/full cancellation tests.\\n- `payments-ticketing/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/service/EventCancellationRefundServiceTest.java` — added mixed success/failure batch continuation + audit status test.\\n- `payments-ticketing/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/api/BookingControllerTest.java` — added quote and cancel-items API contract tests.\\n- `payments-ticketing/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/api/CancellationPolicyControllerTest.java` — added admin policy API auth/validation tests.\\n- `payments-ticketing/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/domain/BookingItemTest.java` — added item state transition tests.\\n- `payments-ticketing/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/domain/RefundTest.java` — updated FR6 refund constructor usage.\\n- `payments-ticketing/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/service/RefundServiceTest.java` — updated FR6 refund constructor usage.\\n- `payments-ticketing/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/service/PaymentServiceTest.java` — adapted to FR6 constructor + internal slot timing dependency.\\n- `admin/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/admin/api/AdminSlotCancelControllerTest.java` — added admin slot cancel orchestration endpoint tests.\\n- `admin/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/admin/api/OrgEventbriteControllerTest.java` — added `SchedulingAdminClient` mock to restore context stability.\\n\\n## Final Status\\n- PASS\\n- Notes:\\n  - Relevant FR6-focused suites passed:\\n    - `mvn -q -pl payments-ticketing -Dtest=CancellationPolicyServiceTest,CancellationServiceTest,EventCancellationRefundServiceTest,BookingControllerTest,CancellationPolicyControllerTest,PaymentsTicketingArchTest test`\\n    - `mvn -q -pl admin -Dtest=AdminSlotCancelControllerTest test`\\n  - Full module suites passed:\\n    - `mvn -q -pl payments-ticketing test`\\n    - `mvn -q -pl admin test`\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_nXymZlIjtxdvofBTJf0fdx2n"
  }
}
```
